Art · Stockholm - Studio Gold
**2D Artist - Unannounced Game Project**
========================================


Apply for this job


### **Role Overview**


As a UI artist on this unannounced project, you will help shape a new chapter in Paradox Interactives’ constantly growing catalogue of games. You’ll work closely with an Art Director, UX Designer, Programmers and Content Designer to create a variety of 2D assets from illustrations, UI Elements and concept art. This project is early in its development and you’ll have the opportunity to contribute with your own artistic style to it within the established direction to help shape it until full production.

**Key Responsibilities**
------------------------


Visual Design & Implementation

* Create high-quality UI elements, icons, portraits, illustrations, and other 2D assets.
* Develop and establish aspects of the game's visual direction.
* Implement and optimize UI assets in the game engine with a focus on readability and performance.
* Find modular smart ways to approach upscaling down the line.


Collaboration & Iteration

* Work closely with the Art Director to shape the 2D art language of the game.
* Partner with UX Designers to ensure clear and player-friendly navigation in interface.
* Work with Programmers to integrate UI features while maintaining design intent.


Creative Problem-Solving

* Come up with your own takes to not-yet established elements while communicating with the team about requirements and direction.
* Help establish a visual language that demands readability and quality.

### **Requirements**

* Strong portfolio demonstrating hand-painted digital art skills and a keen eye for painting, composition, concept art and UI.
* Able seamlessly to switch between more illustrated graphic design and realistic painting.
* Working experience designing UI from concept to final implementation.
* Understanding of UX principles and ability to collaborate with UX specialists.
* Moderate scripting skills for UI integration.
* Comfortable using English in spoken and written form.

### **Bonus Skills**

* Understanding of briefing and feedbacking outsource vendors
* Passion for Paradox’s grand strategy titles or modding and interest in historical themes.
* Skills in CSS, Actionscript, Javascript and HTML.

  

As part of the recruitment process, you may be asked to perform a test.

### **Practical information**

**Scope: Full-time and permanent with a 6 month probation period**

**Reports to: Managing Producer**

**Location: Stockholm, Sweden. Relocation will not be provided.**

Stockholm - Studio Gold

title: Engineering Manager till Bonnier News
description:
Vill du leda team som bygger framtidens digitala medieupplevelse? Vi på Bonnier News söker en Engineering Manager som kombinerar teknisk skärpa med ett genuint ledarhjärta.


**Om oss:**  

Med cirka 2 500 journalister och omkring 7 000 anställda över hela landet är Bonnier News Sveriges ledande nyhetsaktör och en av Nordens största mediekoncerner. Vi har över 200 varumärken, inklusive några av Sveriges mest välkända tidningar som DN, Expressen och Dagens industri. Vår journalistik når ut till sex miljoner läsare, lyssnare och tittare varje dag. Att försvara det fria ordet är centralt för oss.


Bonnier News utvecklare finns på flera orter i Sverige och Norden – i team som jobbar tätt på plats eller distribuerat över gränserna. Vi arbetar agilt och i tvärfunktionella team där utvecklare och Product Managers samarbetar nära med redaktion, analys och UX/design. Vi värdesätter olika bakgrunder och erfarenheter, för vi tror att de bästa lösningarna föds när många perspektiv möts. Vad vi alla har gemensamt är uppdraget: att driva en medieplattform som är skalbar, intelligent och alltid på – i tjänst för det fria ordet och den journalistik som gör skillnad.


**Om rollen:**  

Som Engineering Manager hos oss leder du utvecklare i ett eller flera tvärfunktionella team med fokus på kvalitet, stabilitet och leveranstempo. Du är länken mellan teknik, produkt och affär – och du skapar de förutsättningar som gör att dina team verkligen kan glänsa.


Du deltar aktivt i tekniska diskussioner, väger arkitektur- och designbeslut och säkerställer att teknikval håller ihop med både produktvision och långsiktig plattformshållbarhet. Tillsammans med Utvecklingschef och avdelningens ledning omsätter du vår tekniska strategi till konkreta initiativ – och du ser till att teamen alltid vet vart de är på väg och varför.


**Dina främsta arbetsuppgifter:**

* Leder och coachar utvecklare genom feedback, mentorskap och kompetensutveckling
* Följer upp tekniska KPI:er och leveransförmåga och driver kontinuerliga förbättringar
* Samarbetar nära Product Manager för att balansera produktmål med tekniska behov
* Driver arbetet med teknisk skuld, kodkvalitet och långsiktig plattformsutveckling
* Skapar en teamkultur präglad av samarbete, lärande och välmående
* Representerar teknikperspektivet i forum där prioriteringar och strategiska vägval diskuteras

**Vem är du?**  

Vi söker dig som har en stark teknisk bakgrund och ett genuint intresse för ledarskap. Du trivs i en roll där du får kombinera teknik, människor och affär, och där du både arbetar strategiskt och nära teamen i vardagen. Som ledare är du närvarande, lyhörd och tydlig. Du har förmågan att skapa engagemang, bygga förtroende och utveckla både individer och team. Du är bekväm i tekniska diskussioner och har ett intresse för arkitektur- och designfrågor. Du arbetar strukturerat, är lösningsorienterad och har en god förståelse för hur teknik skapar värde för användare och verksamhet.  



  

**Kvalifikationer:**

* Relevant akademisk utbildning inom exempelvis teknik eller management.
* Flerårig erfarenhet av mjukvaruutveckling samt en gedigen bakgrund inom systemutveckling
* Erfarenhet av arbetsledning och/eller personalansvar med dokumenterat goda resultat
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta i agila utvecklingsteam och god förståelse för agila arbetssätt
* Förmåga att aktivt delta i tekniska diskussioner samt göra välgrundade bedömningar av arkitektur- och designbeslut
* God förståelse för hur tekniska val påverkar affärsvärde och produktutveckling
* Erfarenhet av att driva teknisk kvalitet, hantera teknisk skuld och arbeta långsiktigt med plattformsutveckling
* Stark kommunikativ förmåga och vana att samarbeta med både tekniska och icke-tekniska intressenter

**Meriterande:**

* Erfarenhet av apputveckling
* Erfarenhet av prenumerationssystem/betalsystem

**Övrig information:**  

Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning som börjar med en sex månaders provanställning.


Du kommer att tillhöra Area Tech. Du rapporterar till Utvecklingschef och tillsammans sitter vi i ”Tidningshuset” på Gjörwellsgatan 30, Kungsholmen i Stockholm eller på någon av våra "hubbar" i Kalmar och Sundsvall.  

  



För att få reda på mer om vår rekryteringsprocess, klicka här !

title: Product Designer
description:
Sleep is something we all share. It's so fundamental that when we don’t get enough good-quality sleep, we struggle to function in all other aspects of life. That's why we at Sleep Cycle have made sleep improvement our mission, and how you can help improve global health by joining our effort!  

  

We’re now looking for a Product Designer to join our team for the next chapter of our journey.  

  

Are you driven by the idea of improving global health through thoughtful product design? Ready for a design challenge that actually impacts lives? Do you feel excited about taking a groundbreaking sleep apnea product from concept to reality?

 **Your Mission:**  

As a Product Designer in our Sleep Apnea team, you will play a central role in bringing a brand new product to market, a contactless Sleep Apnea detector designed to help people identify one of the most common and under diagnosed sleep disorders in the world. This is a rare opportunity to shape a product in a space where great design can have a direct impact on people's health.  

  

For both current and future software products, you will own the end to end design process. Covering user research and early concept exploration through interaction design and polished UI, you’ll be working closely with your Product Manager and Tech Lead in a cross functional team. Given the nature of the product, you bring an understanding of designing in a regulated or health related context, and you take usability, accessibility, and clinical clarity as seriously as craft and aesthetics.  

  

**Your Key Responsibilities:**

* Plan and conduct user interviews and usability tests, and translate insights into concrete design decisions.
* Drive UX research and ensure the team stays connected to real user needs throughout discovery and delivery.
* Create wireframes, prototypes, and high-fidelity UI, and know when each is the right tool for the job.
* Actively work with and evolve our design system to ensure consistency and scalability.
* Ensure accessibility according to WCAG as a natural part of your design process.
* Collaborate closely with developers and the product manager, representing design throughout the full product lifecycle.
* Contribute to the product's strategic direction from a user perspective.

 **What we are looking for:**

* Several years of experience as a UX/UI designer or Product Designer in a cross-functional product team.
* Experience from software products within medtech, health tech, or other regulated industries
* Strong in both User research and visual/interaction design
* Experience working with and evolving design systems.
* Solid understanding of WCAG and accessibility-driven design.
* Comfortable independently driving user interviews and usability tests, including formative and summative.
* Experienced working closely with developers and used to iterative, hypothesis-driven development.
* Fluent in Figma.
* Fluency in English

 **Nice to Haves:**

* Experience designing for iOS. Used to working in a data-driven and experimental environment.
* Experience with animations and micro-interactions.
* Fluency in Swedish.
* A genuine interest in sleep and health.
* Usability and human factors documentation, including planning, execution, and reporting of evaluations

 **Not sure if you meet every requirement?**  

We encourage you to apply anyway - we value diverse perspectives and experiences and are committed to finding the right person, not just the perfect resume.

 **What’s in it for you?**  

A supportive and ambitious team that truly enjoys working together. Real impact, interesting challenges, and a strong product focus. You’ll work from our stunning office on the 20th floor of Kineum in Gothenburg, together with talented and friendly colleagues.


We look forward to your application!


Please note that we only accept applicants with a valid work permit for Sweden.

title: UX-designer
description:
Vi har nu ett nytt behov och söker därför en konsult och kollega med nedan kvalifikationer. Tjänsten är en del av vår konsultverksamhet vilket innebär att du blir anställd av oss och arbetar hos kund alt. interna projekt och åtaganden.

 **Din profil (Skall krav)**  

* Minst 4 års praktisk arbetserfarenhet inom UX-design och användarcentrerad utveckling.
* Minst 3 års erfarenhet av att arbeta med de olika delar som ingår i tjänstedesignsprocessen (user research, idégenerering, prototypande och testning, paketering).
* Minst 2 års erfarenhet av UX-arbete med stora externa webbplatser.
* Minst 2 års utbildning inom design på universitetsnivå eller motsvarande.

  

**Meriterande**  

* Arbetserfarenhet av att använda prototypverktyg, som till exempel Figma
* Goda kunskaper och tidigare erfarenheter av arbete med digital tillgänglighet
* Arbetserfarenhet av eller utbildning inom kommunikation
* Arbetserfarenhet av webbredaktionellt arbete

  

**Sista ansökningdatum:** 09-04-2026 **Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**


Spännande uppdrag hos våra många kunder. Vi fokuserar på långsiktiga uppdrag, vilket ger dig möjlighet att skapa värde för kunden samtidigt som du utvecklas själv.


En trygg månadslön – tillsammans bestämmer vi en grundlön baserad på dina uppdrag.


Tjänstepension och stora möjligheter till löneväxling.


Semester - Önskar du mer än 30 dagar semester, kanske 60 dagar?


Privat sjukvårdsförsäkring, olycksfallsförsäkring och livförsäkring för ökad trygghet.


Kompetensutveckling – du får själv sätta din budget och välja vilka utbildningar du vill delta i.


Livskvalitet - Har du kanske svårt att få ihop pusslet i vardagen och önskar arbeta lite mindre och ändå kunna tjäna lika mycket om inte mer?  

  

*Vi hanterar ansökningar löpande, med hänsyn till höga arbetstrycket är det extra viktigt med en kort motivering för tjänsten som förklarar hur man möter kraven.*

title: Data-driven Marketing Analyst till internationell e-handelsmiljö
description:
Vi söker nu en Marketing Analyst inom global e-handel till ett spännande konsultuppdrag.


I denna roll får du möjlighet att arbeta datadrivet med att förbättra onlineförsäljning, konvertering och kundupplevelse över flera marknader. Du blir en viktig del i att optimera e-handelsplattformen och stötta både globala och lokala team i deras arbete.


Uppdraget passar dig som är analytisk, affärsdriven och trivs i en internationell miljö där du får omsätta data till konkreta förbättringar.


Arbetsuppgifter:

* Analysera e-handelsdata för att identifiera förbättringsområden.
* Optimera konverteringsgrad och kundresor.
* Arbeta med produktlistningar, prissättning och kampanjer.
* Bygga dashboards och visualisera data.
* Identifiera trender och beteendemönster hos kunder.
* Segmentera målgrupper och bidra till ökad retention och LTV.
* Samarbeta med globala och lokala team.


Krav:

* Du har en kandidatexamen inom marknadsföring, business, analys.
* Du har minst 5 års erfarenhet inom marketing analytics, e-handel eller business analysis.
* Du har en stark analytisk förmåga och kan omsätta data till affärsinsikter i en internationell miljö.
* Du har erfarenhet av Google Analytics, Excel samt BI-verktyg som Tableau eller Power BI.
* Du har kunskap inom SQL, dataanalys, datavisualisering och statistisk analys.
* Du har erfarenhet av e-handelsflöden, konverteringsoptimering samt god förståelse för UX och kundresor.


Övrig information:

* Placeringsort: Stockholm.
* Distansarbete: Hybrid.
* Omfattning: 100%.
* Startdatum: 2026-05-01.
* Slutdatum: 2027-05-01.


Vi erbjuder ett utvecklande konsultuppdrag där du får arbeta i en global kontext och bidra till att driva digital tillväxt.


Vi ser fram emot din ansökan. Vänligen skicka in ett uppdaterat CV på engelska, anpassat till rollen.


Sway Sourcing är en innovativ rekryteringspartner som specialiserar sig på att matcha rätt talang med rätt företag – snabbt och effektivt. Vårt huvudfokus ligger inom Ekonomi, Administration, HR, Marknad och IT, men vi har även den breda expertis och flexibilitet som krävs för att leverera skräddarsydda rekryteringslösningar inom alla branscher.


Trots att vi är en relativt ny aktör har vi redan byggt förtroende hos många av Sveriges största företag och arbetar både nationellt och internationellt. Med baser i Sverige och Spanien erbjuder vi en unik kombination av lokal expertis och global räckvidd. Vårt starka nätverk och djupa branschinsikter gör oss till en självklar partner för företag som vill ligga steget före i sin rekrytering.

title: Join an Agile Team as UX Designer – Lund-Based Role
description:
We are looking for a UX Designer to join an innovative and agile development environment within a global organization. You will be part of cross-functional teams working with modern frameworks such as Scrum, Kanban, Lean UX, and Design Sprint


This is a full-time consulting assignment based in Lund, with on-site presence required at least 3 days per week.

### **About the role**


You will play a key role in shaping user-centered digital solutions, collaborating closely with developers and stakeholders. The focus is on delivering intuitive, high-quality user experiences for internal tools and applications.

### **Key responsibilities**

* Conduct user research, including interviews and usability testing
* Translate user insights into clear design solutions
* Design UI for digital tools and applications
* Work within and evolve existing design systems and guidelines
* Collaborate closely with developers to ensure design implementation
* Deliver design assets ready for development

### **Requirements**

* Minimum 2 years of experience in a similar UX/UI design role
* Strong experience in UX/UI design for digital products
* Hands-on experience with user research and usability testing
* Proficiency in Figma (Adobe tools are a plus)
* Experience working in agile environments (Scrum, Lean UX, or similar)
* Ability to create and adapt designs based on existing guidelines
* Experience collaborating with developers and delivering production-ready designs

### **Assignment details**

* Start: May 1, 2026
* End: December 31, 2026
* Location: Lund (on-site 3 days/week)
* Scope: Full-time, 40h/week

### **Application**


Please submit your updated CV in English, clearly tailored to this role


Sway Sourcing is an innovative recruitment partner specializing in matching the right talent with the right company—quickly and efficiently. Our primary focus lies in Finance, Administration, HR, Marketing, and IT, but we also have the broad expertise and flexibility required to deliver tailored recruitment solutions across all industries.


Although we are a relatively new player, we have already gained the trust of many of Sweden's largest companies and operate both nationally and internationally. With bases in Sweden and Spain, we offer a unique combination of local expertise and global reach. Our strong network and deep industry insights make us the obvious partner for companies looking to stay ahead in their recruitment efforts.

title: Product Manager Online
description:
**Jobba för originalet.**
-------------------------


Välkommen till Apoteket, nummer ett sedan 1971. Med visioner för framtiden och kvalitet i varje detalj, skapar vi förutsättningar för ett liv i hälsa. Hos oss utvecklas du i en kultur där din röst alltid blir hörd. Och allt vi får över ger vi tillbaka till samhället. Det är så vi gör skillnad på riktigt.

### **Om Apoteket E-handel & Online Product and Development**


E-handeln är en central del av Apotekets tillväxt, där vår ambition är att möta kundernas behov i en allt mer digital vardag. Här utvecklar vi våra digitala kanaler – app och webb – för att skapa en sömlös, engagerande och relevant kundupplevelse.


E-handeln är inte bara en försäljningskanal, utan också en omsorgskanal där vi gör det enklare för människor att leva med läkemedel, få råd och ta hand om sin hälsa.


Inom Online Product and Development arbetar vi tvärfunktionellt nära både affär och tech, med fokus på att förbättra kundresan, öka konvertering och utveckla personaliserade upplevelser. Du blir en del av ett sammansvetsat team med flera produktledare, UX-kompetens och specialister inom experimentering och growth. Vi har ett nära samarbete, hög transparens och arbetar tillsammans med bl a försäljningsorganisationer inom online och butik samt utvecklingsteamen på Tech för att skapa värde och framtida framgångar för Apoteket.

#### **Din roll**


Som Product Manager Online ansvarar du för att samla och driva e-handelns behov utifrån kundinsikter, affärsmål och tekniska förutsättningar.
  

Du prioriterar teknisk utveckling och skapar rätt förutsättningar för det tvärfunktionella arbetet, i nära samarbete med områden som sortiment, marknad, logistik och farmaci, så att vi når våra affärsmål och levererar på vårt kundlöfte.


Du äger och utvecklar roadmapen för centrala delar av e-handelsaffären, inklusive Apotekets app, webb och checkoutlösningar, samt hur vi använder kunddata för att skapa relevanta och personliga upplevelser. I rollen ingår även att säkerställa att lösningarna är kostnadseffektiva och långsiktigt förvaltningsbara.


Du ingår i Apotekets produktledning och där har du ett helhetsperspektiv på Apotekets portfölj, med särskilt fokus på e-handeln och de delar som är viktiga i vår omnikanal.
  

  

På lång sikt bidrar du till att utveckla Apoteket.se och Apotekets app till apotekskundernas självklara val – den mest relevanta och uppskattade digitala plattformen för köp av läkemedel och apoteksnära produkter.  

  

Tjänsten är placerad på vårt huvudkontor i Solna, Stockholm, med en förväntan att vara på kontoret cirka tre dagar i veckan.


#### **Vad du kommer göra hos oss:**

* Ta fram och driva produktstrategi och roadmap med fokus på Apoteket.se och vår app för att möta framtiden inom agentic commerce.
* Säkerställa att våra tredjepartssystem stödjer e-handelsaffärens behov och utveckling
* Prioritera och säkerställa relevanta initiativ som stödjer affärens mål.
* Driva utvecklingsinitiativ kopplade till kundupplevelse, konvertering och affärsnytta.
* Koordinera arbete mellan verksamhet, utvecklingsteam och externa leverantörer.
* Säkerställa kostnadseffektiva och förvaltningsbara lösningar.
* Arbeta datadrivet med analys, experimentering och A/B-testning.
* Bidra till utvecklingen av Apotekets omnikanalupplevelse.

### **Vem söker vi?**


För den här tjänsten söker vi dig som motiveras av att arbeta i gränslandet mellan affär, teknik och kund och som ser värdet i att skapa lösningar som driver både affärsnytta och kundvärde.


Du har förmågan att analysera komplex information och omsätta den i tydliga prioriteringar och konkreta initiativ. Samtidigt är du lösningsorienterad och bidrar till att utveckla verksamheten framåt.


Du är bekväm med att arbeta självständigt, tar ansvar för ditt arbete och driver det framåt. Samtidigt trivs du i en roll med många kontaktytor där samverkan och stakeholder management är avgörande.

* Du har relevant akademisk examen inom informationsteknologi, Ecommerce eller motsvarande.Du har erfarenhet av Product Management inom e-handel.
* Du har erfarenhet för AI och specifikt agentic commerce.
* Du har erfarenhet av att prioritera utvecklingsinitiativ och balansera verksamhetsbehov, tekniska förutsättningar och leveranskapacitet.
* Du har god teknisk förståelse för e-handelsplattformar, integrationer och systemarkitektur.
* Du har erfarenhet av betalplattformar och betallösningar.
* Du har förståelse för datadrivet arbete, analys och experimentering.
* Du har erfarenhet av teknologier och verktyg såsom React.js, Voyado, A/B Tasty
* Du har förmåga att koordinera arbete mellan flera intressenter såsom verksamhet, utvecklingsteam och externa leverantörer.

### **Vi erbjuder...**

* Friskvårdsbidrag: 5000 kr per år.
* Personalrabatt: Förmånliga priser på många av våra produkter.
* Flexibla helgdagar: Möjlighet att byta arbetsfria helgdagar mot andra dagar på året.
* Förmånsportal (Benify): Erbjudanden inom bland annat kollektivtrafik, leasingbil, gym och hälsobehandlingar.
* Trygga försäkringar: Förstärkt föräldrapenning, tjänstepension (ITP) och kompletterande försäkringar.

#### **Om oss**


Apoteket grundades 1971 och ägs av svenska staten, vilket innebär att vi arbetar både ansvarsfullt och långsiktigt. Vårt viktiga samhällsuppdrag handlar om att förbättra människors hälsa, läkemedelsanvändning och bidra till ökad patientsäkerhet. Med omkring 400 apotek och 3000 medarbetare över hela landet har vi nära samarbete med hälso- och sjukvården – alltid med omtanke om både människor och miljö.


Vårt mål är tydligt: Ett liv i hälsa, för alla.

#### **Praktisk information:**


Nyfiken? Det räcker gott.  

Hör av dig om rollen fångar ditt intresse! Vi berättar gärna mer om tjänsten och vår verksamhet – så du får en tydligare bild och kan avgöra om det känns helt rätt. Vänta bara inte för länge, urval och intervju sker löpande och tjänsten kan tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdatum.


Skicka ditt CV tillsammans med svar på våra urvalsfrågor. Du behöver inte skriva ett personligt brev – frågorna är utformade för att hjälpa oss förstå mer om dina erfarenheter och kompetenser för matchning mot tjänst.


Vi använder tester för objektivt urval som en del av vår rekryteringsprocess. Provanställning tillämpas.

**Välkommen till Apoteket!**
----------------------------

title: Chief Financial Officer (CFO) - CDI - Paris
description:
Since 2014, Wiremind has positioned itself as a **technical company** transforming the world of transport and events with a 360° approach combining **UX, software, and AI**.


Our expertise lies primarily in **optimizing and marketing** our clients' capacity. We work on various projects such as **ticket forecasting and pricing**, **3D optimization of air freight or scraping competitor prices**. Our applications are the preferred tool **of companies** such as SNCF, United Airlines, Qatar Airways or even PSG to visualize, analyze and optimize their capacity.


Dynamic and ambitious, we strive to maintain our technical DNA which is the engine of our success. The company, profitable and self-financed since its creation 10 years ago, is mainly composed **of engineers and experts** and currently supports the growth of our **business model** based on "software-as-a-service" solutions.

### **Your missions**

Wiremind is at a pivotal scaling point and we are looking for a highly analytical and tech-savvy Finance leader to professionalize our financial engine. As our **CFO/COO**, you will not just "manage" accounts; you will be the architect of our growth data, a strategic partner to the CEO, and the driver of operational excellence across Finance, HR, and Legal.

#### **Core Responsibilities**

#### **1. FP&A, Analytical Excellence & Reporting**

* **Data-Driven Steering:** Build and maintain robust financial models, rolling forecasts, and budgeting processes that provide real-time visibility.
* **SaaS Metrics & Unit Economics:** Deep dive into CAC/LTV, Cohorts, and Net Retention to guide our Go-To-Market and pricing strategies.
* **Advanced Reporting:** Establish a monthly "Reporting Pack" for the CEO and Board of Directors, turning raw data into strategic insights.
* **Modern Data Stack:** Leverage and implement advanced tools (AI-driven forecasting, automated reporting) to ensure 100% data reliability.

#### **2. Multidisciplinary Management & Mentorship**

* **Team Leadership:** Directly manage and grow the Finance, HR, and Legal teams. We are looking for a leader who can "blend in" and foster a culture of high performance.
* **Talent Development:** You are responsible for the professional growth of your team members, coaching them to upskill and move toward a more automated, high-value-add way of working.

#### **3. Operational Scaling & International Expansion**

* **Process Engineering:** Design and implement scalable workflows to support international expansion without adding headcount linearly.
* **International Footprint:** Drive the financial and legal structuring of new international entities. You will be the point person for strategic decisions regarding office openings and global compliance (pre and post-funding).
* **AI-Tool Fluency:** Champion the use of AI and automation (Zapier/Make, AI-assisted contract review, smart spend management) to maximize efficiency across G&A.

#### **4. Strategic Support & Capital Markets**

* **Business Partnering:** Act as a co-pilot for department heads (Sales, Product, Tech) to align their operational KPIs with financial goals.
* **Investor Relations:** Support the CEO in future financing cycles (equity or debt), ensuring the "Data Room" is always investment-ready and the "Equity Story" is clear.

**Your profile**
----------------

* **Experience:** 8-12 years of experience. You likely started in **Tier-1 Audit/TS or M&A**, followed by a successful stint in a **high-growth SaaS environment** (Director or VP level).
* **Managerial Depth:** You have a proven track record of managing multidisciplinary teams. You aren't just a technical expert; you are a people leader who knows how to elevate a team.
* **International Mindset:** You have experience navigating international markets and understand the complexities of global operations.
* **Analytical Powerhouse:** You live in spreadsheets but think in systems. You have a "product-mindset" toward finance.
* **Tech-Forward:** Early adopter of AI tools and experience with modern Finance stacks (e.g., Pigment, Pennylane, Spendesk).
* English is our primary language but Native-level French is a significant plus for local compliance and team integration.

**The Benefits**
----------------

* This is a defining career move. You join at the "Goldilocks" stage: enough revenue for stability, but enough complexity to require a total architectural build.
* We are looking for our future CFO/COO. Your impact on the bottom line will directly dictate your trajectory.
* A competitive package based on clear, data-driven KPIs
* Equity (BSPCE) package


You will also benefit from:

* A hybrid policy: 2 days of remote work per week and the possibility to work occasionally from abroad
* A great company culture (monthly afterworks, regular meetings on technology and products, annual off-site seminars, team-building…)
* Access to WellPass at a preferential rate to maintain your well-being
* An annual budget for your IT equipment
* A partnership with the People & Baby network of inter-company nurseries to help with childcare for children aged 0 to 3

  



**Our Recruitment Process**
---------------------------

* A screening interview with our Lead Talent Acquisition Manager
* An interview with Colin
* A technical test or case study to be prepared
* A last interview at our offices to discuss your technical test or case study and meet with members of the team


Wiremind is committed to **equality of opportunity, diversity, and fairness**. We encourage all **candidates** with the necessary experience to apply for our job offers.

title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer
description:
### **The Mission**


We are a Series A HealthTech startup building the "operating system" for hospital equipment logistics. We digitise chaotic workflows, from medical equipment tracking to supplier coordination, so clinicians can focus on patients instead of broken lightbulbs or missing kit.

### **The Role: Series A with Seed Energy**


We are looking for a **Senior Full-Stack Engineer** (~10 years experience) who thrives in the "search" phase of a startup. While we are Series A funded, we maintain a high-agency, pre-PMF mindset. We are rapidly discovering new markets and products, and we need someone who prioritises shipping and product outcomes over technical dogma.


You will join a high-performing, flexible team, reporting directly to the CTO. This is a pure IC role: no management overhead, just high-impact engineering.

#### **What you’ll do**

* **Ship Core Product**: Build the engine that supports configurable B2B workflows, simple UX for time-poor clinical staff, and integrations that solve real-world hospital problems.
* **AI-Native Development**: We expect you to use tools like Copilot to move at 10x speed. You will also help us build LLM-backed features directly into the MediShout platform.
* **Discovery & Iteration**: Work closely with Product and Design to prototype new ideas in days. You are comfortable backtracking if a hypothesis is proven wrong.
* **Technical Quality**: Help move our complex product configuration into the core codebase and drive our transition toward 100% automated testing.

#### **Your Profile**

* **Stack**: Mastery of Python (Django) and TypeScript (React). Experience with Dart/Flutter is a significant bonus.
* **Mindset**: You are proactive, product-focused, and comfortable with the ambiguity of a fast-moving startup.
* **Experience**: ~10 years in software engineering, ideally with B2B SaaS or complex workflow systems.
* **Location**: Hybrid. Based in the UK and able to regularly join the leadership team in London.

title: UX-designer
description:
Vi har nu ett nytt behov och söker därför en konsult och kollega med nedan kvalifikationer. Tjänsten är en del av vår konsultverksamhet vilket innebär att du blir anställd av oss och arbetar hos kund alt. interna projekt och åtaganden.
   

  

**Din profil (Skall krav)**
* Minst 4 års praktisk arbetserfarenhet inom UX-design och användarcentrerad utveckling.
* Minst 3 års erfarenhet av att arbeta med de olika delar som ingår i tjänstedesignsprocessen (user research, idégenerering, prototypande och testning, paketering).
* Minst 2 års erfarenhet av UX-arbete med stora externa webbplatser.
* Minst 2 års utbildning inom design på universitetsnivå eller motsvarande.


**Meriterande**
* Arbetserfarenhet av att använda prototypverktyg, som till exempel Figma
* Goda kunskaper och tidigare erfarenheter av arbete med digital tillgänglighet
* Arbetserfarenhet av eller utbildning inom kommunikation
* Arbetserfarenhet av webbredaktionellt arbete


**Sista ansökningdatum:** 
 09-04-2026
   

  

**Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**
 🚀 Spännande uppdrag hos våra många kunder. Vi fokuserar på långsiktiga uppdrag, vilket ger dig möjlighet att skapa värde för kunden samtidigt som du utvecklas själv.
   

  

 🌟 En trygg månadslön – tillsammans bestämmer vi en grundlön baserad på dina uppdrag.
   

  

 💼 Tjänstepension och stora möjligheter till löneväxling.
   

  

 🌴 Semester - Önskar du mer än 30 dagar semester, kanske 60 dagar?
   

  

 🏥 Privat sjukvårdsförsäkring, olycksfallsförsäkring och livförsäkring för ökad trygghet.
   

  

 📚 Kompetensutveckling – du får själv sätta din budget och välja vilka utbildningar du vill delta i.
   

  

 🕑 Livskvalitet - Har du kanske svårt att få ihop pusslet i vardagen och önskar arbeta lite mindre och ändå kunna tjäna lika mycket om inte mer?
   

  

* Vi hanterar ansökningar löpande, med hänsyn till höga arbetstrycket är det extra viktigt med en kort motivering för tjänsten som förklarar hur man möter kraven.

title: User Experience Designer
description:
**UX/UI Designer (iGaming) | Frontend Experience | Stockholm Hybrid** 




  





 We’re looking for a creative and detail-oriented UX/UI Designer with frontend experience to join our Stockholm-based team. This role is ideal for someone with a background in iGaming or betting, who understands the nuances of high-performance, user-focused digital products in a fast-paced environment.
 



  





 You’ll be responsible for turning minimal or evolving requirements into intuitive, engaging user experiences, contributing across the full design lifecycle from concept through to implementation.
 



  





**Key Highlights:** 



* Translate limited or evolving requirements into effective UX/UI solutions
* Strong portfolio demonstrating user-centered design across web or mobile products
* Experience working closely with frontend development to ensure seamless execution



  





**Requirements:** 



* Previous experience in iGaming, betting, or a similar high-traffic digital product environment is highly desirable
* Strong understanding of user behaviour in fast-paced, conversion-driven platforms
* Ability to work onsite in Stockholm 3 days per week (hybrid model)

title: Product Designer
description:
Bannerflow is a fast-growing global SaaS company building a Creative Intelligence Platform that enables enterprise brands to predict, create, and optimize advertising across channels.
   

  

 Our teams are highly autonomous, collaborative, and we are now looking for another passionate Product Designer to join us!
   

  

**Ready for a new challenge? Here is what we offer.**
**Team spirit, built upon trust & ownership. Together, we decide how to win.**
 We trust each other and take great ownership in what we do. We respect the individual, assume the best in others and believe in close collaboration and communication, within and outside the team.
   

  

**New challenges and personal growth.**
 We live by our entrepreneurial spirit, this means taking risks, identifying opportunities and always seeking new solutions. Do you have ideas how we can scale even faster? Bring them on!
   

  

**A passionate and fun culture.**
 We are passionate about our work and believe that having lots of fun is essential for both creativity and success. Welcome to a diverse and inclusive workplace, with a lot of fun and exciting activities going on- including Health Month, inspirational sessions, team activities, company trips and board game nights.
   

  

**A stable and global industry-leader based in Stockholm, expanding and scaling to new markets!**
 We’re in a great position to drive success and seize new opportunities, our international customer base is constantly growing and so is our product. With the support of our new owners, we are making moves to expand into new markets, setting a clear course for growth in 2025.
   

  

**🦋 Are you + Bannerflow = true?**
 As a product designer, you play a key role in turning product innovation into a user-friendly experience supporting customers' pains and our company's objectives simultaneously. You will participate in the end-to-end product development process and run several initiatives in parallel. You will have a high degree of freedom when shaping the user experience for some of the world's most famous brands to accelerate their online marketing.
   

  

**Some Of Your Responsibilities Will Include**
* Champion User-Centric Design: Drive our design direction by ensuring users remain at the heart of every decision. Use user research and data insights to prioritize customer needs and deliver value-driven solutions.
* Understand the Business Impact: Develop a deep understanding of our business model and ensure that design decisions are informed by and contribute to broader business objectives.
* Drive Cross-Functional Collaboration: Work closely with teams across tech, product, and other relevant stakeholders to address complex UX and UI challenges with elegant, innovative solutions.
* Communicate Design Ideas Effectively: Share your vision through high-quality concepts and prototypes. Recognize when pixel-perfect details are needed and when quick, low-fidelity sketches can effectively convey ideas.
* Support Development Implementation: Provide developers with detailed and clear design specifications to ensure your vision is translated into a seamless user experience.
* Tracking: Set routines for tracking and optimization of implemented features and solution
* Efficient WoW: Take ownership of identifying efficient way of working, challenging the status quo


**So, what are we looking for?**
**We Are Looking For Someone With The Following Criteria**
* 4+ years of experience as a Product Designer, balancing user needs with business goals and hands-on experience in user research.
* A portfolio showcasing user-centered designs with a strong focus on complex product challenges (ideally, in B2B/SaaS).
* You feel comfortable using your toolbox of design methodologies and are interested in industry trends and best practices that can enhance our products and processes.
* You are interested in trying out and using new technologies, including AI products, in your daily work.
* Excellent communication skills, both in presenting ideas and giving/receiving feedback.
* You have a problem-solving and commercial mindset that thrives in a fast-paced and collaborative environment.
* It’s a bonus if you have experience within the digital advertising landscape.


 We believe that our employees are the key to our success and we are dedicated to building a positive and supportive work environment where our employees can thrive and grow. We are committed to building a diverse and inclusive team and welcome applications from candidates of all backgrounds, experiences, and abilities.
   

  

 If you are ready to take your career to the next level, we want to hear from you!

title: Senior UX Designer
description:
As a Senior UX Designer at BookBeat, you will focus on improving how users discover, sign up, and fall in love with our service. This means working hands-on across the full funnel — from first impression and onboarding to payment and retention.
 



 You’ll be part of the Conversion team, working closely with developers, CRO specialists, product and marketing in a highly data-driven environment where ideas quickly turn into features and experiments.
 



  





 This is a role with real ownership and impact: your work directly affects how many users choose to start and stay with BookBeat.
 



  





 The Conversion team is responsible for developing BookBeat’s user acquisition platform on the web, user offers, retention, payment solutions, user account handling and customer support platforms. We work cross-functionally with teams across BookBeat, with the marketing teams across our markets as our key stakeholders.
 



  





**The role includes, among other things, to:** 



* Own and improve key user journeys across our web platforms
* Identify user needs through research, data analysis and experimentation together with the team
* Design user journeys that are intuitive, inclusive and accessible for all users
* Ensure a cohesive and consistent design of our web platforms
* Turn insights into hypotheses and drive continuous optimization
* Facilitate workshops and collaborate with stakeholders across teams



  





**We are looking for someone who:** 



* Has at least 4 years of experience in UX design, in a B2C environment
* Has a good understanding of accessibility standards and inclusive design
* Has experience working closely with product, developers and marketing
* Is used to working with experimentation (A/B testing is a plus)
* Communicates clearly and enjoys collaborating with others
* Is fluent in Swedish and English



  





 Are you ready to take on the role of our new Senior UX Designer in the Conversion Team? Apply today! If you have any questions, please contact our Chief Business Development Officer william.jakoby@bookbeat.com.
 



  





**As an employee of BookBeat AB, you can enjoy a benefit package that includes the following:** 




 🌴 30 days of vacation each year
 



 💰 ITP1 occupational pension
 



 💌 Occupational group life insurance, work injury insurance & business travel insurance
 



 🎾 Yearly wellness allowance
 



 🤸 Weekly wellness hour
 



 💻 Working equipment (computer and phone) as well as phone subscription
 



 🎧 BookBeat subscription
 



 🏥Occupational health services to ensure your well-being
 



 👶Parental leave benefits to support your growing family
 



 📜 Collective agreement
 



  





**In addition to our benefits, we’ll also provide you with:** 




 💜 A stable and sustainable work-life balance. We use flex time and work 37,9 hours a week
 



 🏢 An office located in the heart of Stockholm
 



 🏃 … including access to a full gym complete with a sauna! We also arrange other fun wellness activities, such as our own running club
 



 🚀 The opportunity to grow in your role and career, including challenging & educational work tasks as well as opportunities for education
 



 ✨ Fun activities together with colleagues! At BookBeat you’ll enjoy weekly Friday afternoon mingles, monthly company breakfasts and other work events such as Holiday & summer parties, and frequent company wide events.
 



 🧪 The opportunity to explore projects that you might not have time to do in your day-to-day work during Hack Days
 



 🧠 Knowledge sharing opportunities, e.g. during our weekly Friday demo where different teams share what they’ve been or will be working on. Knowledge sharing is also an integral part of our everyday work
 



 🐶 The opportunity to bring your furry dog friend to work (and cuddle with dogs at work)! We have recently introduced a dog room at our Stockholm office
 



 🤛 (Last but definitely not least) A wonderful and skilled team and manager that will support you throughout your employment!
 



**About us** 




 In 2015, we began our journey towards the goal of offering Europe’s leading service for digital books and in 2016, we launched to the public. Now, about 10 years since our broad launch, BookBeat is used by over 1 million users every month. We are an ever-growing company within the Bonnier Group and all members who join our journey have the possibility to make an impact on our development – both in the short and long run.
 



 Today, Team BookBeat consists of around 170 curious and committed doers. Are you interested in becoming part of our team? Wonderful! While our employees are experts at many different areas, we have four core values uniting all of us:
 



 🚀 Be great at what you do
 



 📣 Share what you know
 



 🔎 Curiosity for our users and us
 



 🤝 Build Team BookBeat
 



 In other words: we want our employees to continuously deep dive into and develop within their area(s) of expertise, but also to share that knowledge with their colleagues – we’re all in this together and cooperate (most often a lot) on a daily basis! We’re also looking for employees who are genuinely curious about our users, journey and organization, a curiosity that drives us to always test out new things in our service and to let our users show us if we’re on the right track. Last but definitely not least we want all our employees to contribute to the everyday cooperations and the wellbeing of Team BookBeat – as already mentioned, we’re in this together and we want our team to be healthy and happy at work, and we all contribute to this in different ways.

title: Product Lead
description:
SalesKong is an AI-driven sales assistant helping B2B sales teams spend time on customers, not admin. Backed by leading investors and used by fast-growing B2B SaaS teams, we’re now focused on building a product users genuinely rely on every day. That’s where you come in.
 



  





**What this role is** 




 This is your chance to be at the core of a well-funded and innovative startup as we scale our product and redefine what's possible in sales tech.
 



 As a Product Lead, you'll work closely with the founders and play a key role in shaping our strategies and products. Your work will include:
 


* Owning major parts of the roadmap together with the founders
* Run product discovery and decide which problems are worth solving
* Writing concise product specs and helping structure execution
* Working closely with engineering to ship features



 You’ll get broad exposure to the company, with a primary focus on building the right features in the right order.
 



  





**Who We Seek** 




 We don't need a traditional PM background. We care more about how you think than where you've been.
 


* Recent or upcoming graduate with a Bachelor’s or Master’s degree, ideally in Engineering or Business from a top-tier university.
* Ambitious, analytically sharp, and thrive in dynamic environments.
* Enjoy the startup climate and have an 80/20 mindset.
* Strong communication skills in Swedish and English
* Genuinely interested in B2B SaaS, AI products, and building great user experiences



  





**Why Join** 



* Be part of Stockholm’s startup hub at Founders House
* Take ownership and move fast in a lean, and focused team
* Work on a high-impact product loved by users
* Shape the future of AI-powered sales in Europe



  





**Practical Information** 



* Location: Central Stockholm (Founders House), Hybrid
* Start Date: August 2026 or as soon as possible
* Travel: Some international travel may be required
* Salary: Competitive

title: Digital Content & AI Specialist (Project Assignment)
description:
**Who we believe you are**
 You are a skilled communicator with 2–5 years of professional experience across digital channels and formats. With a background from an agency, consulting, or a well-known organization, you have experience as a Digital Communicator, Content Manager, Art Director, Motion Graphic Designer, or UX Writer. You excel in stakeholder management and identifying customer needs. You hold a degree in media, communication, digital design, or data. Fluency in Swedish and professional English is required.
   

  

 You are an initiative-taking digital doer with a strategic, AI-first mindset. You work independently, take ownership of your role, and adapt quickly to the dynamics of large organizations. As a creative problem solver, you enjoy both independent work and collaborating with a team to bounce ideas.
   

  

 Your technical curiosity drives you to explore new tools and smarter ways of working. You are a "learn-by-doing" person who understands how AI enhances content creation and transforms marketing processes. You navigate complex platforms with ease and enjoy experimenting with automation and new digital workflows.
   

  

 You thrive in environments characterized by rapid change. You are insight-driven, explorative, and focus on communication goals and customer value. Your curiosity allows you to apply your skills in new contexts and grow through varied assignments.
   

  

 You are available for project-based employment for an initial 3–6 months, with the potential for extension up to 12 months. The monthly salary range is SEK 32,000–43,000, depending on experience and the scope of the assignment.
   

  

**Requirements**
* 2–5 years of multi-channel experience from an agency or corporate environment.
* Relevant education in media, communication, digital design, or data.
* Strong written and visual communication skills.
* Hands-on experience with AI tools such as Google Gemini, Claude code, OpenAI/ChatGPT, Midjourney, and Leonardo AI.
* An AI-first, automation-oriented, and highly adaptive mindset.
* Fluency in Swedish and professional English.


**In our assignments, you can expect to:**
* Plan, coordinate, and take responsibility for our clients’ presence in digital channels.
* Produce and optimize written and visual content, including publishing and follow-up.
* Act as an advisor and hands-on specialist in digital communication, AI, and automated workflows.
* Participate in digital projects to optimize content operations and ways of working.


**What Curious Mind can offer you**
 We’re content consultants born in the digital era driven by strategy, thoughtful production, and a passion for innovation. With us, you’ll enjoy a varied professional life at a company that values expertise, personality, and genuine connection. If you’re curious and driven by growth, you’ll feel right at home here.
   

  

 Some of what we’re offering you:
   

  

* Access to a support system of experts and personal coaches
* A culture that actively promotes caring and supportive leadership
* Competitive compensation package
* Access to Eidra’s network of specialists, from brand strategy to tech development


 If you have any questions, please contact Ville Krantz, ville.krantz@curiousmind.se. And if you would like to know more about Curious Mind, please feel free to visit our website. We interview on an ongoing basis.
   

  

 Curious Mind is a Nordic content partner with a global reach, fueled by curiosity. Our team of around 50 content consultants helps brands across the Nordics grow through digital communication, with impact that travels far beyond our borders.
   

  

 We’re proud to be part of Eidra, a carefully selected group of specialist companies. While we each have our own craft, we’re united by a shared ambition: to help our clients become leaders in their fields.
   

  

 Our modern offices in the heart of Stockholm are home to a vibrant community, where we work side by side with our sister agencies.

title: Product Analyst - Merchant Information
description:
**About Us**
 Visa is a world leader in payments technology, facilitating transactions between consumers, merchants, financial institutions and government entities across more than 200 countries and territories, dedicated to uplifting everyone, everywhere by being the best way to pay and be paid.
   

  

 At Visa, you'll have the opportunity to create impact at scale — tackling meaningful challenges, growing your skills and seeing your contributions impact lives around the world.
   

  

 Join Visa and do work that matters – to you, to your community, and to the world. Progress starts with you.
   

  

**Job Description**
 Tink was founded in 2012, and a decade later became part of Visa in 202. Tink was created with the aim of changing the banking industry for the better. We have built Europe’s most robust open banking platform – with the broadest, deepest connectivity and powerful services that create value out of the financial data. We offer the tools that allow anyone – from big banks and fintech to startups – to build the future of financial services across Europe.
   

  

 The Data & Risk product family has a clear mission: transforming complex financial data into clear, actionable insights that empower institutions to make smarter decisions and consumers to improve their financial health. We are a tightly knit team of product managers, backend and frontend engineers, platform architects and data scientists working towards enabling data-driven decisions.
   

  

 What you will do
   

  

 We are looking for a Product Analyst to support the product team working on Merchant Information. You will help translate customer feedback and product needs into clear insights, support day-to-day product execution, and strengthen our quality practices through testing and validation.
   

  

 This role is a great fit for someone who enjoys working with data, product quality, and structured problem solving, and who wants plenty of room to grow into deeper analytical and modelling-oriented work over time.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Support in processing and structuring customer feedback, helping the team identify patterns, common issues, and opportunities to improve product quality and usability
* Support in creating visualizations, querying data, and analyzing quality signals to help track performance and guide product improvements
* Support in testing, validation, and QA, including helping validate behavior changes during migrations and ensuring outputs meet expected standards for accuracy and consistency
* Collaborate closely with product managers, engineers, and other stakeholders to help clarify requirements, document expected behavior, and support reliable delivery across releases
* Help maintain lightweight documentation, reports, and follow-ups that make it easier for teams to understand quality, progress, and where to focus next


 This is a hybrid position. Expectation of days in the office will be confirmed by your Hiring Manager.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 Basic Qualifications: 2 or more years of work experience with a Bachelor’s Degree or an Advanced Degree (e.g. Masters, MBA, JD, MD, or PhD) Preferred Qualifications: 3 or more years of work experience with a Bachelor’s Degree or more than 2 years of work experience with an Advanced Degree (e.g. Masters, MBA, JD, MD) 1 - 3 years of experience in a product analyst, data analyst, QA, product operations, or similar role in a technology-driven environment We are looking for a curious and detail-oriented person who enjoys working with data, product behavior, and quality, and who is comfortable collaborating with technical teams. You don’t need to have done all of the below before — what matters most is strong fundamentals and a willingness to learn. Comfort working with data, for example by using SQL, spreadsheets, dashboards, or other tooling to explore issues and communicate insights (tooling can be learned on the job) Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with attention to detail and an interest in understanding how systems behave end-to-end Experience supporting testing, validation, or quality assurance activities is a plus Clear written and verbal communication skills: you’ll help summarize findings, document outcomes, and support structured collaboration Interest in developing deeper expertise over time in areas like quality analysis, structured modelling, and data-driven product improvement
   

  

**Visa is an EEO Employer**
 Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability or protected veteran status. Visa will also consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories in a manner consistent with EEOC guidelines and applicable local law.

title: Product Lead
description:
**About Magma Math**
 Magma is one of the world's fastest-growing and most celebrated EdTech companies, transforming math education through the power of AI. Our platform turns handwritten solutions into digital insights, empowering teachers to focus on creativity and deeper learning - while giving them real-time visibility into student progress.
   

  

 The result? More inclusive, engaging, and effective math classrooms for all learners.
   

  

 But we're not just building better tools. We're tackling one of the biggest challenges in global education: math
   

  

 underperformance. With 1 in 5 students globally struggling in math - a subject that forms the backbone of so many career paths - we believe the opportunity to improve outcomes at scale is massive.
   

  

 We're already the go-to solution in thousands of schools - and we're just getting started. As we expand rapidly across the U.S. and Europe, we're building a team as ambitious as our mission: to help millions of students unlock their full potential in math.
   

  

**The Role**
 The Product & Tech team at Magma is divided into three core experiences: Teacher, Student and District. With a growing user base and plenty of problems to solve, we're hiring a
 **Product Lead of Student Experience** 
 to own the student-facing part of our product and take full ownership of the space.
   

  

 You will define the vision and strategy for the student experience, manage stakeholders across the organization, and align priorities across teams. You are ultimately responsible for making sure every feature we ship moves the needle for learners.
   

  

 At the same time, you will act as Product Manager for one of the product units - working side-by-side with developers, QA and designers to plan, build and launch features. You will own a domain end-to-end - from figuring out what problem is worth solving, to shipping a solution, to making sure it actually creates value.
   

  

**Who You Are And What You Know**
* Have experience structuring complex problems, aligning stakeholders, and turning ambiguous challenges into clear strategies
* Have experience leading and growing product teams; you know how to build structure and set meaningful KPIs
* Be hands-on across the full product development cycle: user research, design, implementation, testing. This is not a pure project manager role where you are only coordinating
* Have strong technical understanding, enough to engage with engineers
* Be structured and always questioning the status quo - you plan ahead and look for better ways to work
* Be curious and eager to learn - and a team player who understands others' perspectives


**Your Responsibilities Will Include**
* Owning the vision, strategy and roadmap for the Student Experience, ensuring we remain leaders in our space
* Balancing long-term strategic planning with short-term, high-impact delivery
* Championing customer-centric thinking across the product lifecycle
* Leading a team of developers, QAs and designers as hands-on PM for one product unit, from discovery to implementation
* Coordinating efforts across the product, tech, customer success and revenue teams
* Setting KPIs and long-term goal structures
* Mentoring and developing team members


**Requirements**
* 3-6 years of experience with background as product owner or product designer, or 2-3 years of experience as a consultant with strong interest and experience with tech & product
* Experience of fast-paced and high-performance environments
* Experience leading people and teams
* Engineering degree (or equivalent) from top tier university
* Startup experience - you know what you are getting yourself into!


 Nice to have
   

  

* Proven track record in product management, including leadership experience
* Consulting toolkit
* Experience in edtech or education
* Previous roles in software engineering or data science
* Portfolio of products you've built


 What we offer
   

  

* Real ownership - you set the strategy, not just the slide deck
* Build and ship high touch products with positive impact on millions of users
* Be part of driving change in an industry and in global education
* Ambitious colleagues in a fun environment
* Competitive remuneration & benefit package
* Annual company trip
* An opportunity to work on a meaningful mission and have an exceptional impact on education, society and how children learn math across the world


 Start: As soon as possible
   

  

 Location: Stockholm
   

  

**Our Recruitment Process (all In Office)**
* 1st interview with Hiring Manager and Head of People
* 2nd interview with Hiring Manager and Magma team member
* 3rd interview with Founders and Magma team member


 Note: We practice a 5-day in office policy, and we look forward to working together closely with you.
   

  

 Office location: Stora Nygatan 27, 11227 Stockholm, Sweden

title: Kommunikatör
description:
CIKO är en omställningsorganisation som bildades 2019 av arbetsgivarföreningen Fremia och LO. CIKO verkställer Omställningsavtalen Fremia – LO som omfattar möjligheten till stöd genom omställnings- och vägledningsinsatser samt ekonomisk ersättning. Avtalen berör omkring 140 000 personer och syftar till att ge stöd till ett nytt arbete för personer som sägs upp på grund av arbetsbrist eller ohälsa, eller som vill vidareutbilda sig under anställning. Läs gärna mer om oss på ciko.se.
 



  





**Ditt uppdrag:** 




 Vill du ta ansvar för CIKOs digitala röst och skapa innehåll som når fram? Som kommunikatör ansvarar du för vår närvaro i digitala kanaler, vår webbplats och för kommunikationen kring vår nya digitala plattform
 *Trygga* 
 . Uppdraget är brett och operativt, med utrymme att påverka innehåll, struktur och strategisk inriktning. Du är ensam kommunikatör men arbetar nära kollegor inom IT, UX, rådgivning, rådgivning och ledning och rapporterar till vår VD.
 



  





**Exempel på arbetsuppgifter:** 



* Planera, producera och samordna innehåll i digitala kanaler – med särskilt fokus på Facebook och LinkedIn.
* Utveckla kommunikationen kring CIKO och vår digitala plattform Trygga – med fokus på tydlighet och användarstöd.
* Organisera kommunikation för och under CIKO:s digitala transformation.
* Ansvara för redaktörskapet på ciko.se – inklusive innehåll, struktur, tonalitet och löpande uppdateringar.
* Formulera, implementera och följa upp kommunikationsvision och kommunikationsplan.
* Säkerställa ett konsekvent och förtroendeingivande uttryck i språk och innehåll.
* Följa upp effekt, analysera utfall och bidra till fortsatt utveckling av vårt kommunikationsarbete.
* Vara ett kommunikativt stöd till andra delar av organisationen vid behov.
* Göra enklare produktion i text, bild och rörligt.



  





**Din profil:** 



* Högskoleutbildning inom kommunikation, journalistik, media eller motsvarande.
* Erfarenhet av arbete med digital kommunikation, inklusive sociala medier och webb.
* Förmåga att självständigt planera, skapa och publicera innehåll.
* Mycket god språklig förmåga på svenska och engelska.
* Vana av att arbeta med tonalitet, budskap och struktur i kommunikation.
* Erfarenhet av enklare produktion i text, bild och rörligt.



  





**Dina egenskaper:** 




 Då vi är en liten organisation behöver du vara flexibel, van att arbeta självständigt och trygg i att ta initiativ. Du är samarbetsinriktad och lyhörd för olika kompetenser och perspektiv, och du trivs i dialogen med både kollegor och ledning. Du har en god kommunikativ förmåga och ett öga för både helhet och detaljer. Du är prestigelös och trivs med att växla mellan strategiskt arbete och operativt genomförande. Vi lägger stor vikt vid dina personliga egenskaper.
 



  





**Vi erbjuder:** 




 Hos oss får du verka i en samhällsnyttig organisation som har en viktig roll på den svenska arbetsmarknaden. Vi erbjuder goda anställningsvillkor, förmåner och ett arbete som präglas av frihet under ansvar. På CIKO är vi ett tjugotal trevliga och kompetenta kollegor som både stöttar och utmanar varandra för att bli ännu bättre på det vi gör. Placeringsorten är Stockholm, där vårt kontor är beläget i trevliga lokaler på Krukmakargatan 21, nära Mariatorget. Tjänsten omfattar heltid med tillträde enligt överenskommelse.
 



  





**Välkommen med din ansökan!** 




 I denna rekrytering samarbetar vi med Signera Rekrytering. Du visar intresse genom att registrera CV och ett motivationsbrev via signerarekrytering.se, där du beskriver varför du är rätt person för rollen. Vi ser fram emot att ta del av din ansökan så snart som möjligt då urval sker löpande, dock senast den 2 mars. I rekryteringsprocessen kommer vi att använda oss av tester, intervjuer och referenstagning för en rättvis och objektiv process. Eventuella frågor besvaras gärna av Signeras konsult Josefin Johansson, tel. 070-862 09 90 eller researcher Hanna Palmsten, tel. 076-301 95 57.

title: Head of Retail Media SE/NO
description:
**HAYPP GROUP**
 We address one of the world’s biggest problems – how to end smoking. There are 1,1 billion smokers in the world. Around 8 million people die every year from smoking-related diseases. Our goal is to significantly reduce death rates, save lives and inspire people to choose smoke-free enjoyment. How? By offering people other nicotine products online.
   

  

 Haypp Group is one of the Nordics’ leading e-commerce groups with eleven store brands, present in seven countries where we serve more than 1 million active consumers. Through brands such as Snusbolaget.se, Northerner.com, Nicokick.com etc., we sell nicotine pouches, Swedish style snus online as well as disposable vapes. With our headquarters located on Östgötagatan in Stockholm we are 300 team members mainly but not exclusively based in Sweden. Also, we are an innovative and fast-moving company that is growing rapidly, driving sustainable business and are changing the world in the process. We are currently on an exciting expansion journey, converting more and more smokers to smoke-free alternatives across all our markets globally.
   

  

**THE ROLE**
 As the Head of Retail Media for the Nordics, you will own the end-to-end media strategy for our most mature markets. You will work with major brand houses to maximize their visibility on our platforms. This is a role for someone who understands the "Swedish Snus Culture" and the "Norwegian Pouch Market" and knows how to monetize that intent through data-driven advertising.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Nordic Retail Media Ownership: Drive and exceed retail media targets for our brands such as Snusbolaget.se and Snuslageret.no.
* Strategic Account Management: Manage a portfolio of key Nordic suppliers, acting as a consultant to help them achieve their brand goals via our onsite channels.
* Inventory Management: Balance the "Goldilocks" zone of ad frequency—ensuring brand partners get visibility while maintaining the premium user experience our Nordic customers expect.
* Advanced Reporting: Use our proprietary 1st-party data to provide deep-dive insights into Nordic consumer behaviour and helping brands understand their campaign performance over time.
* Regulatory Guardrail: Stay ahead of Swedish and Norwegian marketing laws to ensure all media creative is compliant but effective.
* Cross function collaboration: Collaborate with cross-functional teams including commercial partnerships, marketing, business unit managers and creative teams to align retail media initiatives with overall business objectives.
* Industry trends: Stay up to date with industry trends, competitive landscape and emerging technologies to identify new growth opportunities.
* Budget management: Develop and manage budgets for retail media campaigns, tracking expenses and reporting on financial performance.


**What We're Looking For**
* Experience: 9+ years in E-commerce, Retail Media, or Digital Sales. Experience within the Nordic FMCG or regulated goods sectors is a massive advantage.
* Market Knowledge: A deep understanding of the digital landscape in Sweden and Norway, including consumer trends.
* Commercial DNA: You enjoy the "pitch." You are comfortable presenting to senior figures, building trust through knowledge and experience.
* Analytical Skills: Proficient in Excel, Google Analytics, and ideally BI tools like PowerBI or Tableau.
* Cultural Fit: You thrive in a fast-paced, "fail fast, learn faster" environment typical of a Stockholm tech scale-up.


**What We Offer**
 We are a value driven company with our values
 *We team up* 
 ,
 *Innovation Drives Us* 
 ,
 *Inclusion and Non-Hierarchy* 
 and
 *Going the Extra Mile* 
 at the heartbeat of everything that we do. With us you can always expect to get help from people who want to achieve things together and to be able to speak your mind in every social constellation you are part of. We highly value all ideas no matter where they come from, and we are not afraid to try new things out. We are also welcoming, inclusive and everyone at Haypp Group has a voice. In addition, we seize opportunities by putting in hands-on, hard work and celebrating when we reach our goals. With us, you should always feel safe, appreciated and valued but at the same time challenged and excited.
   

  

**Benefits**
 Because we recognize that our team members are our most important differentiator, we offer our team members generous benefits. We offer the following perks to everyone at Haypp Group:
   

  

* Premium ITP1 occupational pension savings plan
* Insurance plan, including private healthcare
* 30 days of paid vacation
* Parental pay lift
* Wellness allowance of 5,000 SEK per year
* Lots of social happenings


**SEND US YOUR APPLICATION TODAY!**
 If this sounds like a place where you would want to contribute and grow, let us know you’re interested by submitting your application!
   

  

 Haypp Group is committed to equality and diversity, and we welcome applications from all qualified individuals regardless of ethnicity, religion, age, gender, sexual orientation, disability, and marital status. We want to offer you great recruitment experience, and if there is anything we can do to make you more comfortable in the process with us, please let us know.
   

  

 If you have any questions about the role or what it’s like to work at Haypp Group in general, feel free to reach out to our responsible recruiter Lea Sjösten at lea.sjosten@hayppgroup.com. We look forward to hearing from you!
   

  

 The Haypp Group is spearheading the global transformation from smoking to healthier product alternatives. With origins in Scandinavia our extensive experience from pioneering markets in smoke free alternatives, as well as being a leader in the e-commerce sector, we now fully bring our vision to a global scale.
   

  

 With 11 e-commerce brands, the Haypp Group is present in seven countries where we serve more than 1 100 000 consumers.

title: Software Engineer- Fullstack
description:
**Vill du bygga lösningar som gör skillnad för miljontals sparare och skapa framtidens bankupplevelse? Nu söker vi dig som älskar kombinationen av modern Java och Angular, och som vill arbeta på en arbetsplats som värdesätter teknisk innovation och samarbete högt.** 




  





**Varför Avanza?** 




 Hos oss är teknik inte bara kod – det är ett verktyg för att skapa samhällsnytta. Du blir en del av en inkluderande miljö där vi tror på att man presterar som bäst när man mår bra. Här kombinerar vi en hög teknisk ambition med att ha kul på jobbet. Vi jobbar i autonoma team, delar kunskap prestigelöst och firar framgångar tillsammans.
 



 Var med på en spännande resa! Vi har påbörjat en omfattande molntransformering mot Google Cloud Platform (GCP), till 2030 ska vi huvudsakligen vara helt molnbaserade och vi har en ambition att Avanza ska vara "AI-first".
 



  





**Din roll hos oss** 




 Som Fullstackutvecklare kliver du in i ett av våra ca 45 agila team. Du får ett helhetsansvar – från den första idéskissen till att koden snurrar stabilt i produktion. Beroende på vilket team du hamnar i kan din roll se olika ut, du kan ha lika stor tyngd på backend som frontend eller ha störst tyngd på frontend alternativt backend.
 



  





**I Vardagen Innebär Det Att Du** 



* Designar och utvecklar skalbara webbapplikationer i en modern mikrotjänstarkitektur.
* Tar ägarskap för hela stacken: från responsiva gränssnitt i Angular till robust logik i Java.
* Drivs av samarbete: Vi tror starkt på par- och mobbprogrammering för att sprida kunskap och höja kvaliteten.
* Formar tekniken: Du deltar aktivt i designprocesser och arkitektoniska beslut.
* Optimerar flöden: I nära samarbete med Product Managers och UX-designers skapar du smidiga användarresor.



  





**Vem är du?** 




 Vi tror att du är en lagspelare som trivs när du får kombinera tekniskt djup med ett helhetstänk kring produkten. Du är nyfiken, kommunikativ och ser värdet i en kultur där det är lika självklart att be om hjälp som att erbjuda den.
 



  





**Vi Söker Dig Som Har** 



* Några års erfarenhet som Fullstackutvecklare med fokus på Java och moderna frontend-ramverk (främst Angular, men React är också meriterande).
* Goda kunskaper i HTML, CSS och JavaScript/TypeScript.
* Vana av att bygga och underhålla applikationer i komplexa produktionsmiljöer.
* Ett öga för ren, testbar och välstrukturerad kod.
* Erfarenhet av (eller ett stort intresse för) agila arbetssätt och kontinuerliga förbättringar.
* Förmågan att läsa och förstå svenska.



  





 Det är ett plus om du har arbetat inom Fintech tidigare eller har ett extra intresse för UX och designsystem.
 



  





**Hur vi jobbar** 




 Vi jobbar datadrivet och iterativt för att snabbt kunna leverera värde till våra användare. För oss är hållbar utvecklingstakt inte bara ett modeord – det är fundamentet i vår kultur.
 



  





**Redo att bli en av oss?** 




 Vi går igenom ansökningar löpande och ser fram emot att höra mer om dig och din resa!
 



  





**Ansökan** 
 : Klicka på "Ansök"-knappen och bifoga ditt CV eller din LinkedIn-profil.
 



  





*Erbjudanden från rekryteringsföretag och annonssäljare undanbedes vänligen men bestämt.* 




  





 Avanza är Sveriges ledande plattform för sparande och placeringar. Vi drivs av att förändra branschen genom att utmana de stora bankerna och försäkringsbolagen på den svenska sparmarknaden. Vi vill vara tjänsten som förenklar och förbättrar spararnas ekonomi, oavsett om man älskar aktier eller bara vill ha ett bra sparande. Vår vision är att skapa en bättre framtid för miljoner människor. Därför står våra kunders bästa alltid i fokus, precis som det borde vara. Affärsidén är enkel – mer till dig, mindre till banken. En idé som gett oss Sveriges nöjdaste sparare 16 år i rad.

title: Senior AI Engineer
description:
**Join us!**
 We’re always happy to hear from people who are eager to learn and grow, and share our values. Read more about the role and apply.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As a Senior AI Engineer
 **,** 
 you will play a pivotal role in reshaping how businesses operate through the strategic use of Data and AI. This role is about reimagining how organizations compete and grow in the digital era.
   

  

 You will design and deliver advanced AI solutions, with a strong focus on Generative AI, aligned with Futurice’s global vision and local strategy of driving measurable business impact. Working closely with clients, you will uncover real opportunities, co-create innovative approaches, and bring them to life—turning ambition into tangible results.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Design, develop, and implement innovative AI solutions, with a strong focus on Generative AI
* Explore and experiment with the latest advancements in Generative AI, including autonomous agents, systematic AI evaluation, advanced RAG architectures, and multimodal UX
* Lead the technical direction and delivery for AI projects, collaborating with AI engineers, data engineers, and developers
* Explore and experiment with the latest advancements in Generative AI such as LLMs, diffusion models, and related technologies
* Develop reusable assets and tools to support scalable client delivery
* Collaborate closely with strategists, designers, and other technical experts
* Stay up to date with trends and advancements in AI and proactively identify innovation opportunities
* Contribute to client proposals, discussions, and presentations
* Take initiative and drive projects forward to deliver great client outcomes


**Who We’re Looking For**
* Strong foundation in data science, machine learning, and AI
* Strong programming skills,for example in Python.
* Experience evaluating and optimizing Generative AI applications
* Genuine passion for Generative AI and real-world applications
* Experience with frameworks and technologies used to build Generative AI solutions
* A growth mindset and eagerness to learn
* Proven ability to deliver results and make things happen
* Strong problem-solving skills and creativity
* Strong teamwork and collaboration skills
* Good communication skills for both technical and non-technical audiences


**Ideally, you also have**
* Experience with cloud platforms (Azure, AWS, GCP)
* Full-stack capabilities
* Experience with retrieval systems, especially RAG
* Familiarity with data engineering
* Consulting experience or strong interest in business problem-solving with AI


**Experience In Any Of The Following Is a Plus**
* Docker
* CI/CD
* Haystack
* Open WebUI
* FastAPI
* JavaScript


**Futurice offers you**
 At Futurice, we support your growth as a professional and as a person. You’ll work on a diverse portfolio of projects with motivated, multi-talented colleagues across technology, design, and strategy.
   

  

**In Addition, We Offer**
* A hybrid work model
* Free choice of work equipment (laptop, phone, accessories)
* Sports and lunch benefits
* Futurice clubs and community activities
* Learning events and certification programs


**Compensation**
 Your compensation package will be discussed during the recruitment process. Our salary model is based on skills, responsibilities, and impact, with a fixed salary and the possibility of performance-based bonuses.
   

  

**Next steps**
 If this sounds like the opportunity you’ve been looking for, we’d love to hear from you. Our application process is simple: submit your contact details, CV, and a few lines about yourself and why you want to join Futurice. You’re also welcome to share links to LinkedIn or a portfolio.
   

  

 Our recruitment process typically includes an initial conversation, an in-depth discussion with future colleagues, and a final general chat. Reference checks are a natural part of the process.
   

  

**What’s It Like To Work Here**
 Ever since Futurice was founded, we’ve focused on creating a workplace people genuinely enjoy, Mondays included. We’ve built a welcoming culture where trust, kindness, and well-being matter as much as great work. Our atmosphere is open and warm, whether you’re in the office or working remotely. You’ll quickly feel part of the community where coffee chats, virtual fikas, or after-work hangouts happen naturally.
