title: Enterprise Security Architect
description:
**Introduction**


As Autoliv continues its digital transformation, the role of Enterprise Security Architect is critical to ensuring that security is embedded not just in our systems—but in our strategy. In this role, you will define the long-term direction of cybersecurity architecture across the organization, working closely with Enterprise Architecture to align security capabilities with business priorities, risk appetite, and future needs. This is a strategic leadership position for someone who sees the big picture, understands the details, and can connect the two to drive meaningful, secure change.

**Mission**


To define, align, and govern Autoliv’s long-term cybersecurity architecture across business units, technologies, and global initiatives. The Enterprise Security Architect sets the direction for secure transformation—partnering closely with the Enterprise Architecture function to embed security into strategic planning, target states, and solution blueprints across the entire organization.


This is a future-looking, cross-domain role that ensures our security architecture evolves with the business, supports innovation, and upholds trust at scale.

**Key Responsibilities**

**Strategic Architecture Leadership**

* Define and maintain Autoliv's enterprise security target architecture, aligning with business strategy, digital transformation, and regulatory frameworks.
* Translate enterprise risk and business objectives into architecture principles and actionable guidance for all security domains.

**Cross-Domain Integration**

* Work across domains (IT, OT, Product, Cloud, AI, Data, Supply Chain) to ensure security-by-design is embedded consistently in all architecture layers.
* Collaborate with Enterprise Architecture, Infrastructure, Digital Engineering, and Business Solution Architects to co-develop secure, scalable patterns.

**Governance & Standards**

* Lead the development of security architecture frameworks, design principles, and reference models across domains.
* Drive adoption of standardized controls, reusable patterns, and security capability models (e.g., aligned with NIST CSF, SCF, TOGAF).

**Transformation Enablement**

* Provide architecture direction to major digital transformation initiatives, including AI/ML orchestration, manufacturing modernization (CSiM), and cloud platform strategy.
* Review and guide solution designs for strategic programs to ensure enterprise alignment and security assurance.

**Risk & Business Alignment**

* Ensure security architecture supports risk-informed decision making, regulatory compliance, and performance visibility.
* Connect technical design to business impact by linking architecture outcomes with resilience, agility, and trust.

**Communication & Leadership**

* Act as a visible security thought leader in architectural forums and governance boards.
* Educate and influence senior stakeholders on the value of security architecture in achieving long-term business goals.

**Key Competencies & Skills**

* 10+ years in security architecture roles, including experience with global enterprise environments.
* Deep understanding of architecture frameworks (TOGAF, SABSA), risk management (ISO 27005, FAIR), and security standards (NIST CSF, SCF, ISO/IEC 27001).
* Proven experience translating business strategy into actionable architecture.
* Ability to lead cross-functional collaboration and facilitate enterprise-level decision-making.
* Broad knowledge of security domains: IAM, cloud, data protection, OT, AI, DevSecOps, supply chain security.

**Why This Role Matters**


Our transformation journey spans everything from connected factories to intelligent edge, AI, and global services. As Enterprise Security Architect, you will ensure that this journey is secure, aligned, and resilient—helping Autoliv lead with confidence and integrity in a changing world.

title: PLM Teamcenter Expert
description:
At Capgemini Engineering, the world leader in engineering services, we bring together a global team of engineers, scientists, and architects to help the world’s most innovative companies unleash their potential. From autonomous cars to life-saving robots, our digital and software technology experts think outside the box as they provide unique R&D and engineering services across all industries. Join us for a career full of opportunities. Where you can make a difference. Where no two days are the same.
   

  

 We are seeking an experienced PLM Consultant with deep expertise in Teamcenter configuration, customization, and support to join our team. If you enjoy solving complex problems, collaborating with clients in a global environment, and optimizing PLM environments - this is the perfect position! The position will be based in Sweden, but daily work is carried out
 **fully remote** 
 towards our team in Spain.
   

  

**Your role**
 As a key member of our PLM support team, you will support, maintain, and enhance our clients’ Teamcenter environments. You will work hands‑on with multiple Teamcenter modules and help translate business needs into robust technical solutions.
   

  

*In this role you will play a key role in:*
* Maintain, support, and enhance Teamcenter solutions across the client organization.
* Configure and customize Teamcenter modules to meet business requirements.
* Collaborate with clients to gather requirements and design effective technical solutions.
* Develop and update technical documentation, including configuration guides and best practices.
* Lead training sessions and workshops for users and technical teams.
* Troubleshoot and resolve complex Teamcenter issues to ensure system stability and user satisfaction.


**Your profile**
* 5+ years of hands‑on experience administrating and supporting Teamcenter.
* Strong knowledge of Teamcenter AWC architecture, modules, and customization.
* Experience with at least one of the following: Easy Plant, Quality, or SLM.
* Fluent in English (spoken and written).
* Excellent analytical, troubleshooting, and communication skills.
* Ability to work independently and collaboratively within a team environment.
* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.


 We would like you to have expertise in any of the following areas: Active Workspace Client (AWC), Easy Plant, Quality (QMS), Service Lifecycle Management (SLM)
   

  

 For this position, Swedish citizenship is mandatory
   

  

**What We Believe You Will Enjoy About Working Here**
* Opportunity to work with leading industrial clients.
* Professional growth in a highly skilled PLM team.
* Collaborative and supportive working environment.
* Competitive compensation and benefits.


 Application
   

  

 As part of our recruitment process, identity verification or background checks may occasionally be conducted.
   

  

**About Capgemini**
 Capgemini is a global business and technology transformation partner, helping organizations to accelerate their dual transition to a digital and sustainable world, while creating tangible impact for enterprises and society. It is a responsible and diverse group of 340,000 team members in more than 50 countries. With its strong over 55-year heritage, Capgemini is trusted by its clients to unlock the value of technology to address the entire breadth of their business needs. It delivers end-to-end services and solutions leveraging strengths from strategy and design to engineering, all fueled by its market leading capabilities in AI, generative AI, cloud and data, combined with its deep industry expertise and partner ecosystem. The Group reported 2024 global revenues of €22.1 billion. Get The Future You Want | www.capgemini.com

title: Cyber Security (IAM) Analyst
description:

 The role is positioned as an IAM Engineer/analyst, focused on delivering technical expertise, platform configuration, and capability improvements within the IAM domain. The emphasis is on hands on engineering, implementation, troubleshooting, and support — project management or coordination activities.
 



  





 - Knowledge Areas:Core IAM & Directory Expertise ensure secure and reliable identity operations.
 



 - Protocols & Integration Skills – Solid understanding of modern authentication standards.
 



 - Automation & Troubleshooting – ability to diagnose authentication, access, and identity platform issues across cloud and on prem environments.
 



  





 The IAM Engineer is expected to:
 



 • Work hands on across core IAM areas such as identity lifecycle automation, authentication, authorization models, IGA workflows, PAM solutions, directory services, and non human identity management.
 



 • Configure, optimize, and maintain IAM platforms and services, ensuring alignment with security standards and best practices.Implement IAM controls, integrations, policies, and automation used across the organization.
 



 • Collaborate with architects, governance teams, and security stakeholders to translate requirements into technical solutions and platform configurations.
 



 • Contribute technical input to design discussions, capability improvements, and IAM roadmap activities — without owning delivery timelines.Troubleshoot identity related issues, support incidents, and ensure stability and quality of IAM services.

title: Solution Consultant
description:
We are in Business for People, empowering people in service organizations with innovative Enterprise and Business software solutions. We’ve innovated and taken a new approach to delivering ERP that works for people. Self-driving, adaptive and intuitive software that is changing the way people work. Our solutions empower people and deliver a better people experience so people can spend time on meaningful high value work they live for.
   

  





 Read more on our website about how we transform work and how people feel about it, so our customers and their people can thrive.
   

  

  

  




**Job Description**

**Our job in Solution Consulting is to understand our customers’ business challenges and to accurately show how Unit4 solutions can solve these through value driven outcomes.**



* To attain the best possible solution, you will spend time researching and discovering the business challenges and desired outcomes. You will understand the customer, challenge them, and become their voice in the sales process.
* You will delight and inspire our customers to help shape and deliver value-driven outcomes. You are a trusted advisor who will naturally lead our customers and colleagues.
* You will gradually evolve to be an expert in Unit4 solutions, you will understand and sell the value of Unit4 solutions and why Unit4 is different to other suppliers in the marketplace.
* You love technology and you are driven to find the best possible solutions for our customers. Your integrity and expertise set you apart from other roles in sales; customers will trust your advice and Unit4 customer success will believe in the vision you create for customers during the bid stages.
* As the buying journey continually evolves, you'll be expected to produce demo recordings and digital demo content.
* You will be involved in a wide range of activities including but not limited to business case support, discovery sessions, solution demonstrations, tenders and RFP’s, handovers to onboarding teams, working with partners, subject matter expert groups and product focused development.


**Qualifications**

 You are likely to succeed in this role if you:
   

  




* Have a relevant academic background, for example in Economics, Industrial Engineering and Management, Industrial Economics, or other relevant education.
* Has 3+ years of relevant professional experience in roles such as Controller, Accountant, Financial Analyst, or similar positions, where you have worked closely with business processes, systems, and stakeholders or other similar experience
* Are comfortable preparing and delivering solution demonstrations, workshops, and presentations that connect solutions to real business outcomes and customer value.
* Enjoys variety and change, and are motivated by working across different customers, industries, and sales situations.
* Are interested in solutions and value creation and enjoy working closely together with Account Executives to demonstrate the value of our world‑class solutions and help customers become successful.
* Works well both independently and collaboratively and feel comfortable taking ownership while being part of a broader, cross‑functional team.
* Speak fluent Swedish and English, both spoken and written.


**Additional Information**

 Join Unit4 and be part of one of the most exciting journeys in the cloud ERP software space. We’re a fast-paced, high-growth, people-centric company, delivering enterprise software for a great people experience, and offering our own people a host of benefits and development opportunities. Grow with us At Unit4, we offer:
   

  




* A culture built on trust - giving you freedom and autonomy to be successful.
* Balance - with our uncapped time off policy, remote working opportunities and Global Wellbeing Days when the whole company can switch off and prioritize well-being.
* Talented colleagues, role models and mentors - work, learn and be inspired by some of the best talent in the software industry.
* Commitment to sustainability - with initiatives such as our Act4Good program, a way for everyone at Unit4 to come together and engage in actions that benefit society and the planet.
* A safe and inclusive working environment – supported by our Employee Resource Groups, which are open to all and include Women at Unit4, Pride at Unit4, Mental Health and Access at Unit4, and People of Color at Unit4.

title: AI Engineer
description:
*At RevolutionRace, we’re shaking up the outdoor industry with colorful, innovative, and durable outdoor clothing and gear that are just as affordable as they are high-performing!*
**Join the adventure!** 
 We’re looking for a hands-on AI Engineer to design, build, and deploy AI-powered tools that solve real business problems.
   

  

****About RevolutionRace****
 RevolutionRace is a global Direct-to-Consumer brand creating high-quality functional clothing for people with an active lifestyle. We operate in 40+ markets and grow fast by staying close to our customers, obsessing over product, and moving quickly from idea to execution.
   

  

 We believe AI is a key lever to accelerate everything we do — from marketing and customer experience to internal operations.
   

  

****About The Role****
 This is a builder role. You’ll spend most of your time turning ideas into working systems — not slides — and enabling teams across the company to move faster with AI.
   

  

 You will work closely with marketing, e-commerce, customer experience, and data teams to identify opportunities and ship solutions with measurable impact.
   

  

****What You’ll Work On****
* AI workflows that automate and scale campaign creation across Meta, Google, and TikTok
* Systems for generating, testing, and optimizing content at scale
* Data + AI pipelines that extract insights from customer behavior and drive decisions
* Tools that allow non-technical teams to leverage AI safely and effectively


****What You’ll Do****
* Design and build AI-powered applications and workflows end-to-end
* Integrate LLMs (e.g. OpenAI, Claude) into production systems
* Build APIs and connect systems across our tech stack
* Write clean, production-quality code (primarily Python + JavaScript/TypeScript)
* Deploy and manage applications using modern cloud and CI/CD practices
* Evaluate new AI tools and bring relevant capabilities into the company
* Help teams adopt AI by building tools, not just giving recommendations


**Who are you?**
 We're looking for
   

  

* Experience building real, production-grade systems (AI or software)
* Strong hands-on coding skills (Python + modern web stack)
* Practical experience working with LLMs and AI workflows
* Understanding of APIs, data flows, and system design
* Ability to go from ambiguous problem → working solution quickly
* Comfortable working cross-functionally with non-technical stakeholders


 It's a plus if you have
   

  

* Experience in e-commerce, DTC, or growth-focused environments
* Familiarity with tools like Meta, Google, TikTok, Emarsys, Voyado, Snowflake, Litium
* Experience with RAG, embeddings, or evaluation of AI systems
* Experience deploying scalable AI solutions in production


**Perks of joining us**
 Right in the heart of Borås, you’ll find our home — a spacious, inspiring office where creativity and community come first. Expect open, well-designed workspaces and nature-inspired meeting rooms of all sizes, from Heaven and Iceberg to Desert and Great Forest. And when the sun’s out, we make the most of our two terraces.
   

  

 But the real highlight?
 **Our team** 
 . At RevolutionRace, it’s not just about work—it’s about building something amazing together. A place where creativity thrives, wins are celebrated, and having fun is just part of the process.
   

  

 Need a break? Climb our in-office climbing wall, challenge your colleagues to a game of ping-pong or pinball, or kick back in our massage chair. We have free access to fruit, coffee, and tea, as well as snacks and lunch at cost price in the Fuel Bar! Enjoy exclusive staff discounts, a 5,000 SEK wellness allowance, and gym perks. Beyond work, there’s plenty to explore—AWs, outdoor activities, or social clubs like running, climbing, and DIY creativity. Because life at RVRC is about more than just work!
   

  

****About RevolutionRace****
 RevolutionRace is a fast-growing outdoor brand creating multifunctional outdoor clothing, shoes, backpacks, and accessories for everyone who loves the outdoors. Our mission? To make nature accessible for everyone with colorful, high-performance outdoor gear that’s both premium in quality and fair in price.
   

  

 With a digital-first approach, we reach customers in 40+ countries through 19 unique online stores. Founded in 2013 and listed on Nasdaq Stockholm since 2021, we’re a passionate team of 150+ with our HQ in Borås and an office in Stockholm, constantly pushing boundaries with our customers at the core of everything we do.
   

  

 Read more about us at www.revolutionrace.com.
   

  

**Requirement:** 
 Valid EU work permit
   

  

**Employment** 
 : Permanent position with an initial 6-month probationary period
   

  

**Start date** 
 : As agreed
   

  

**Extent** 
 : 100%
   

  

**Location** 
 :
 *Borås or Stockholm*

title: IAM Project Manager
description:
**Job description** 




 We are looking for a IAM Project Manager.
 



 Who shall have the following responsibilities:
 



 • Take end-to-end ownership of the project (full lifecycle from ideation to optimization) with ultimate accountability for business and customer value delivered
 



 • Set the project mission and OKRs and translate these into a prioritized roadmap and team backlog and communicate to key stakeholders.
 



 • Lead and build a technical cross-functional team of engineers with a business value mindset to expert to execute and deliver value together with other project teams
 



 • Identify opportunities for improving the IAM strategy, policies and processes
 



 • Coach members of the organization on the best practices that should be followed in identity and access management
 



 • Identifying and addressing identity and access management issues
 



 • Establish and manage relationships with key stakeholders to ensure optimal collaboration across Project teams
 



 • Define MVPs, manage project backlog priorities, and strategically de-scope to achieve rapid feedback cycles
 








**Preferred skills and previous experiences** 




 • Structured and pragmatic approach to setting and communicating priorities in a dynamic environment
 



 • Experienced in leading teams in tech development with many dependencies
 



 • Experience in leading technical teams building custom development solutions that are geographically spread
 



 • You are truly a doer, willing to get hands-on solving any problems needed to help the project move forward
 



 • You are structured, analytical and fast in understanding and execution.
 



 • Humble yet driven, you believe in a non-hierarchical culture of collaboration, transparency, safety and build trust and relationships at all levels.
 



 • IAM Knowledge and Experience
 



 -Maintaining up-to-date knowledge of identity and access management best practices
 



 -Documenting IAM processes and procedures, Reporting on identity and access management system activity
 



 -Good understanding of directory services: Active Directory, Azure AD, B2B/B2C, Microsoft Entra and Microsoft Azure AD Identity Governance
 



 -Some knowledge in IAM/PAM solutions e.g. SailPoint, On identity, Saviynt and/or CyberArk
 



 • Project Manager Experience
 



 -Project roadmap development & management
 



 -Project mission & OKR Creation
 



 -Experience with Jira

title: Business Development Representative - Nordics - V.I.E
description:
**OUR STORY:**
 🇪🇺 Join Scaleway and shape the sovereign cloud of tomorrow !
   

  

 Since 1999, we have been designing secure, sustainable infrastructures aimed at supporting the most ambitious companies.
   

  

 Historically known for our dedicated servers (Dedibox), we made a strategic shift to cloud computing in 2015. Staying true to our principles of simplicity, flexibility, and technical excellence, we have become one of the leading players in Europe in the sector.
   

  

 With the rise of artificial intelligence, we have strengthened our commitment, supported by the Iliad Group, which is investing €3 billion to develop a serious, sovereign AI alternative to American and Asian giants.
   

  

 Every day, thanks to our fast-growing portfolio of cloud and AI products (bare metal, containerization, serverless, AI, etc.), Scaleway proudly serves thousands of customer across the private and public sector, from corporations like France Télévisions or Hachette Livre, to fast-growing startups like Photoroom and Biolevate, to institutions like the City of Copenhagen.
   

  

 📍 Our offices are located in
 **Paris, Lille, Toulouse, Rennes, Rouen, Bordeaux and Lyon.**
**WHY WE NEED YOU?**
 Our growth in the Nordics region is driving us to strengthen our Sales team to accelerate strategic outbound prospection and expand our footprint across Sweden and neighboring markets.
   

  

 Your mission will be to generate qualified opportunities through targeted outbound and inbound prospection in order to fuel pipeline growth and support our Account Executives in closing high-value cloud deals.
   

  

**YOUR FUTURE TEAM**
 We work in a collaborative and international environment where the diversity of
   

  

 Scalers, combined with a spirit of sharing, helps bring new projects to life every day,
   

  

 advancing our ambitions together.
   

  

 You will be part of a team of 8 people composed of a Manager, a Team Lead, and
   

  

 Business Development Representatives working closely with Account Executives.
   

  

 Each BDR operates in a duo with an Account Executive, targeting around 200 strategic accounts.
   

  

 The team works collectively on cold calling sessions, outbound campaigns, account
   

  

 mapping, and continuous training initiatives. With 80% of the team currently on
   

  

 target, the culture is performance-driven, supportive, and highly collaborative.
   

  

 Manager information: Orlando Bocaly
   

  

**YOUR DAILY ROUTINE**
 Tasks
   

  

 Identify and prospect strategic target accounts in the Nordics region (mainly Sweden)
   

  

 Execute cold calling, cold emailing, and outbound campaigns
   

  

 Run structured prospection plans to reach and exceed monthly targets
   

  

 Map accounts and identify key stakeholders and decision-makers
   

  

 Qualify inbound leads and generate new outbound opportunities
   

  

 Work closely in duo with Account Executives to build pipeline
   

  

 Collaborate with Sales Architects to refine value propositions
   

  

 Use tools such as Salesforce, Outreach, Lusha, Humanlinker, Gmail,
   

  

 Scaleway internal tools, and Confluence
   

  

 Participate in team prospecting sessions, events, and regional initiatives
   

  

 Track performance metrics and continuously optimize outreach strategies
   

  

**About You**
**HARDSKILLS :**
 At least 1 year of experience as a Business Development Representative, Sales Development Representative, or Inside Sales Representative
   

  

 Proven experience in outbound prospection (cold calling, cold email, hunting)
   

  

 Knowledge of IT, SaaS, or Cloud environments (AI/cloud knowledge is a strong plus)
   

  

 Experience using sales tools such as Salesforce, Outreach, or similar CRM/prospecting platforms
   

  

 Ability to structure a prospection plan and manage a defined portfolio of target accounts
   

  

**SOFTSKILLS :**
 Strong hunting mindset with a results-driven approach
   

  

 Excellent communication and social skills, charismatic and easy to talk to
   

  

 Target-oriented with a clear understanding of KPIs and performance metrics
   

  

 Resilient and comfortable with high-volume outbound activity
   

  

 Fluent in Swedish, English and French
   

  

 🚀
 **Why join the Scaleway adventure?**
 ✔ A rich and diverse product offering: Scaleway offers over 100 public cloud
   

  

 products in IaaS, PaaS, and AI.
   

  

 ✔ A cutting-edge technical environment: Scaleway provides modern infrastructures,
   

  

 including high-performance bare metal servers, to tackle exciting technical
   

  

 challenges.
   

  

 ✔ Commitment to responsible cloud: Scaleway is dedicated to a more responsible
   

  

 cloud, with data centers powered solely by renewable energy since 2017, minimizing
   

  

 our ecological footprint and holding top-level certification.
   

  

 Additionally for this role :
   

  

 Join a leading European cloud provider expanding in the Nordics
   

  

 Attractive commission structure with strong earning potential
   

  

 A high-performing team (80% on target)
   

  

 Opportunities to attend industry events across the region
   

  

 A strong, supportive, and performance-driven team culture
   

  

 🔜
 **THE NEXT STEPS …**
 HR screening with our Talent Acquisition team (30 min)
   

  

 Interview with Orlando Bocaly, Hiring Manager, to understand your experience
   

  

 and approach to prospection (45 min)
   

  

 Role play and practical case (including video answers) to validate your
   

  

 expertise (1h)
   

  

 Interview with the Head of BDR and an Account Executive to deepen
   

  

 discussions and assess team fit (45 min)
   

  

 Final discussion with the CSO and office visit to meet your future colleagues
   

  

*At Scaleway, we are committed to building an inclusive and respectful workplace where everyone has a fair opportunity to thrive.*
*All applications are considered with care, regardless of age, gender, sexual orientation, ethnic or social background, religion, disability, or any other characteristic.*
*We believe great ideas come from everywhere, and everyone which is why you should definitely apply.*

title: Account Manager
description:
Drivs du av att skapa verklig affärsnytta samtidigt som du stärker svensk digital suveränitet? Vill du hjälpa svenska företag att ta kontroll över sin data genom säkra, lokalt svenskbaserade molntjänster med fullt fokus på självständighet och datasäkerhet?
 



  





 Allt fler svenska bolag vill minska sitt beroende av globala leverantörer och istället välja trygga, regulatoriskt säkra och lokalt förankrade alternativ. I den här rollen är du med och driver den utvecklingen – både genom att skapa nya affärer och genom att utveckla långsiktiga kundrelationer inom Cloud & Managed Services.
 



  





 Vi söker nu, för en av våra kunder som är en ledande aktör inom cloud- och managed services i Norden, drivna Account Managers som vill vara med och vidareutveckla denna satsning.
 



  





**Om rollen** 




 Som Account Manager / Säljare inom Cloud & Managed Services blir du en del av ett ambitiöst och affärsdrivet team ute hos vår kund, med tydligt fokus på den svenska SMB-marknaden. Detta är en hunter-roll. Du bygger nya affärer från grunden och ansvarar för att utveckla och fördjupa relationen med dina kunder över tid. Du driver hela säljprocessen, från första kontakt till signerat avtal och vidare till merförsäljning och långsiktig kundutveckling.
 



  





**Du kommer att:** 



* Driva nykundsförsäljning inom Cloud & Managed Services
* Prospektera aktivt genom uppsökande arbete och cold calling
* Boka och genomföra kvalificerade kundmöten
* Identifiera affärsbehov och omvandla dem till tekniska lösningsförslag
* Föra dialog med CTO, IT-chefer, VD och andra beslutsfattare
* Arbeta nära tekniska specialister och solution experts vid mer komplexa affärer
* Arbeta strukturerat med pipeline, budget, forecast och tydliga KPI:er
* Utöver försäljning bidrar du till teamets energi, härliga och inkluderande, jordnära kultur och goda stämning.



  





**Vem vi söker** 




 Vi söker dig som har 3–7 års erfarenhet av B2B-försäljning, gärna inom IT, cloud, infrastruktur eller andra tekniska lösningar. Du har erfarenhet av lösningsförsäljning där flera beslutsfattare är involverade och är van att arbeta mot budget och tydliga försäljningsmål. Du har förmåga att bygga och utveckla långsiktiga kundrelationer och trivs i en roll där du skapar nya affärer och förädlar befintliga.
 



  





 Som person är du affärsdriven, strukturerad och trygg i dialog med seniora beslutsfattare. Du bidrar med professionalism, energi och laganda. Det är meriterande om du har erfarenhet från cloud eller managed services, men viktigast är din affärsförståelse och ditt driv.
 



  





**Praktikaliteter** 




 Anställningsform: Tillsvidareanställning med inledande provanställning om 6 månader via oss, vilken därefter övergår i en direkt tillsvidareanställning hos kunden.
 



 Ersättning: Grundlön + bonus.
 



 Tjänstebil: Nej.
 



 Kontor: Strax väster om innerstan i Stockholm. Fysiska möten och relationsbyggande är viktigt.
 



 Startdatum: Enligt överenskommelse.

title: IT Service Continuity Manager
description:
**About the Company** 




  





 At FDJ UNITED, we don't just follow the game, we reinvent it. That’s why we’re looking for bold people, passionate to succeed, ready to level-up their game. If you’re driven by innovation, embrace challenges, and want to make a real impact at all levels, FDJ UNITED is your playing field. As a unique sustainable gaming and betting operator in Europe, we set new standards, proving that entertainment and safety can go hand in hand. We offer you the chance to work with advanced technologies and tackle challenges every day. Here, you’ll be part of a team that’s driving gaming and betting forward, with accountability. Joining FDJ UNITED means stepping into an ambitious ride where you can work on iconic brands, design new games, disrupt payment and services, spread positive impact, and push the boundaries of what’s possible in gaming. You’ll work alongside a collective of passionate individuals who help each other every day to create safe entertaining experiences. Join us in shaping the future of gaming. Are you ready to level-up the game?
 



  





**About the Role** 




  





 The IT Service Continuity Manager is responsible for establishing, implementing, and continuously improving OBG's IT Service Continuity Management (ITSCM) framework. The role owns the governance, policy, scope definition, and oversight of IT continuity across the organisation, ensuring alignment with business priorities, regulatory expectations, and recognised standards such as ISO 22301. This is a governance and coordination role. It does not own Incident Management or ITIL operational processes. Instead, it works collaboratively across IT, business units, crisis management, risk, and third-party systems to ensure that IT continuity requirements are clearly defined, implemented, tested, monitored, and continuously improved. Success in this role requires a strong communicator who can influence without authority, build trust across technical and business domains, and lead through collaboration and clarity rather than hierarchy.
 



  





**Responsibilities** 




  




* Establish and lead the ITSCM governance framework
* Develop and maintain the ITSCM Policy
* Define scope, asset criticality, and RTO/RPO methodology
* Ensure alignment between third-party SLAs and business continuity objectives
* Implement and oversee IT continuity testing
* Define KPIs and report maturity to senior management



  





**Qualifications** 




  




* 8+ years' experience in IT governance, resilience, IT risk, or service management
* Proven experience implementing IT continuity frameworks
* Experience with ISO 22301, ISO 27001, ITIL or similar
* Experience in regulated environments preferred



  





**Required Skills** 




  




* A strong communicator who translates technical risk into business impact
* Collaborative and influence-driven
* Self-motivated with strong follow-through
* Humble, pragmatic, and structured in your approach
* Comfortable leading through coordination rather than authority

title: Endpoint Specialist
description:
Är du en tekniskt nyfiken Endpoint Specialist som trivs med att arbeta nära både teknik och användare? Bravida vidareutvecklar sin klientplattform och stärker nu sitt endpoint-team med ytterligare en specialist med fokus på Windows och Intune. Vi söker en Endpoint Specialist som vill driva och vidareutveckla vår Windows-klientplattform i Microsoft 365 och Azure, med fokus på Intune, paketering och central distribution av applikationer.
   

  

**Ditt nya jobb**
 Som Endpoint Specialist blir du en del av IT Core Service och teamet Endpoint Management. Teamet ansvarar för Bravidas klientplattform i en Microsoft 365- och Azure-baserad miljö och arbetar med drift, förvaltning och vidareutveckling av endpoint-tjänsten i en omfattande och tekniskt krävande miljö.
   

  

 I rollen är du en nyckelperson inom endpoint-området och bidrar till en modern, säker och smidig användarupplevelse. Du arbetar i en modern Microsoft 365- och Azure-miljö med tydlig riktning mot molnet och i samarbete med angränsande områden som Entra ID, Microsoft 365 samt Security och Compliance. Rollen har ett tydligt operativt fokus och kombinerar applikationspaketering, förvaltning av Intune och arbete nära den löpande driften av endpoint-miljön.
   

  

 I rollen ingår bland annat att:
   

  

* Ansvara för applikationspaketering och livscykelhantering av applikationer i Intune
* Säkerställa patchning, efterlevnad och säkerhetsinställningar för Windows-klienter
* Hantera avancerad felsökning och eskaleringar inom endpoint-området (3rd line)
* Bidra till förbättring, standardisering och vidareutveckling av endpoint-tjänsten


**Vi söker dig som**
 Vi söker dig som har erfarenhet av arbete med Windows-klienter och endpoint-hantering i större miljöer. Du trivs i en teknisk specialistroll där kvalitet, stabilitet och användarupplevelse är centrala, och där applikationspaketering är en naturlig och viktig del av vardagen.
   

  

 Du har erfarenhet av:
   

  

* Microsoft Intune / Endpoint Manager för Windows-klienter
* Applikationspaketering och distribution (Win32, MSI, EXE)
* Felsökning och incidenthantering i 3rd line
* Arbete i Microsoft 365-miljö, inklusive Entra ID


 Det är meriterande om du också har erfarenhet av:
   

  

* Microsoft Defender for Endpoint eller annan EDR-lösning
* Windows Autopilot och automatiserad utrullning av enheter
* Scriptning och automation, till exempel PowerShell
* Co-management, ConfigMgr och/eller Intune Security Baselines
* Specialiserad applikationspaketering, till exempel CAD-applikationer


 Mycket goda kunskaper i något av de nordiska språken samt engelska är ett krav för denna roll.
   

  

 För att trivas i rollen är du strukturerad, lösningsorienterad och kommunikativ. Du tar ansvar för dina leveranser, uppskattar samarbete och har ett genuint intresse för endpoint-hantering och en säker, välfungerande klientplattform.
   

  

**Bravida som arbetsgivare**
 På Bravida är vi stolta över att leverera känslan när allt bara fungerar. Våra medarbetare har byggt förtroende hos våra kunder sedan 1922 och är hjärtat i vår organisation. Tillsammans levererar vi de mest energieffektiva tekniska lösningarna. Hos oss har du möjlighet att göra skillnad för en mer hållbar framtid. Vi värdesätter mångfald och strävar efter att skapa en säker och inkluderande arbetsplats där alla känner sig välkomna och uppskattade. Din säkerhet kommer först, alltid.
   

  

 Genom våra interna utbildningar erbjuder vi utvecklingsmöjligheter, och i vår starka gemenskap hjälper vi varandra att lyckas. Som en del av vårt team får du chansen att utvecklas både personligt och professionellt. Vi är stolta över att vara ett av Nordens ledande företag inom vår bransch, vilket ger oss möjlighet att erbjuda förmåner som exempelvis förmånliga pensionsavtal, friskvårdsbidrag och vidareutbildning. Läs mer om hur det är att arbeta på Bravida här.
   

  

**Hur söker jag jobbet?**
 Låter det intressant? Då vill vi veta mer om dig! I denna rekrytering samarbetar Bravida med Boxhill Recruitment. Vi hoppas få läsa din ansökan så snart som möjligt! Ansök genom att klicka här, vi lovar att det går enkelt och att dina uppgifter blir säkert hanterade. Om du har frågor om tjänsten är du välkommen att kontakta Petra Törnblom, petra.tornblom@bhill.se alternativt 076-003 60 80.

title: Product Manager – User Platform
description:
**About Us**
 Visa is a world leader in payments technology, facilitating transactions between consumers, merchants, financial institutions and government entities across more than 200 countries and territories, dedicated to uplifting everyone, everywhere by being the best way to pay and be paid.
   

  

 At Visa, you'll have the opportunity to create impact at scale — tackling meaningful challenges, growing your skills and seeing your contributions impact lives around the world.
   

  

 Join Visa and do work that matters – to you, to your community, and to the world. Progress starts with you.
   

  

**Job Description**
 Tink was founded in 2012, and a decade later became part of Visa in 2022. Tink was created with the aim of changing the banking industry for the better. We have built Europe’s most robust open banking platform – with the broadest, deepest connectivity and powerful services that create value out of the financial data. We offer the tools that allow anyone – from big banks and fintech to startups – to build the future of financial services across Europe.
   

  

 The Product and Business Enablement area at Tink has a clear mission: to build the foundational platform services that power our entire product ecosystem. We are a tightly knit team with product managers, backend and frontend engineers, platform architects, and data specialists. By building robust, scalable, and well-designed platform services, we enable product teams across Tink to deliver exceptional value to customers and end users.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
 We are looking for a Product Manager to own and drive the User Platform – a critical backend service that manages user identity, authentication, session management, and user lifecycle across Tink's product suite. This platform underpins how we identify, authenticate, and serve millions of end users around the world, providing the foundation for personalised experiences, security, and compliance.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Define and own the product roadmap for the User Platform, balancing technical debt, scalability requirements, and business needs
* Work closely with backend engineers to define requirements for APIs, data models, and service architectures
* Collaborate with product teams across Tink to understand their user identity and authentication requirements, translating these into platform capabilities
* Partner with security, compliance, and legal teams to ensure the platform meets regulatory requirements (GDPR, PSD2, etc.) and security standards
* Define service-level objectives (SLOs) in partnership with engineering, monitor platform health, and drive improvements to reliability, performance, and scalability
* Manage platform dependencies and integrations with third-party identity providers, authentication services, and internal systems
* Create clear technical documentation and API specifications to enable seamless integration by internal product teams
* Balance competing priorities from multiple stakeholders while maintaining platform stability and forward progress
* Drive data-informed decision-making by defining key metrics, monitoring platform usage, and analysing user behaviour patterns


 This is a hybrid position. Expectation of days in office will be confirmed by your hiring manager.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 We are looking for a technically minded product manager who can bridge the gap between engineering teams and business requirements. You should be comfortable working with backend systems, APIs, and platform architecture while maintaining a clear focus on delivering value to internal and external stakeholders. 3-5 years of product management experience at a technology company, with at least some of that time focused on platform, infrastructure, or backend services Strong technical background – you should be comfortable reading API documentation, understanding system architecture diagrams, and discussing technical trade-offs with engineers Experience with API design, service-oriented architectures, or platform development is highly desirable Understanding of authentication and authorisation concepts (OAuth, JWT, session management, etc.) Familiarity with identity management, user lifecycle management, or related domains is a plus Demonstrated ability to prioritise competing requirements and manage platform roadmaps Strong written and verbal communication skills – you'll be creating technical documentation, API specs, and stakeholder updates Data-driven decision-making approach with experience defining and tracking platform metrics Familiarity with distributed systems, microservices, or cloud infrastructure is beneficial
   

  

**Visa is an EEO Employer**
 Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability or protected veteran status. Visa will also consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories in a manner consistent with EEOC guidelines and applicable local law.

title: Senior Cloud Engineer | Saab | Stockholm
description:
*Vill du vara med och forma framtiden för cloud-plattformar inom en av Sveriges ledande teknikorganisationer? Brinner du för att bygga robust, skalbar och säker cloud-infrastruktur som möjliggör innovation inom försvar och säkerhet? Trivs du i en roll där du kombinerar hands-on cloud engineering med tekniskt ledarskap och arkitekturansvar? Då kan detta vara nästa steg för dig!* 




  





**Din roll** 




 Som Senior Cloud Engineer på Saab spelar du en nyckelroll i företagets fortsatta cloud-resa. Du blir en av de tekniska nyckelpersonerna bakom de plattformar och lösningar som möjliggör utveckling av avancerade system inom bland annat flygteknik, sensorer och undervattenssystem.
 



  





 Rollen är tydligt engineering-driven och hands-on. Du arbetar dagligen med design, implementation och vidareutveckling av cloud-infrastruktur, samtidigt som du bidrar med arkitekturperspektiv, sätter tekniska riktlinjer och hjälper team att göra rätt val över tid.
 



  





**Du kommer att:** 



* Designa, bygga och vidareutveckla cloud-plattformar i AWS och Azure
* Arbeta med Infrastructure as Code, automation och standardisering för att skapa stabila och återanvändbara lösningar
* Bidra till och etablera guardrails, principer och best practices för hur molntjänster används inom organisationen
* Stötta och vägleda utvecklings- och plattformsteam i deras cloud-arbete
* Arbeta nära andra seniora tekniker, DevOps- och plattformsteam samt bidra i tekniska diskussioner och roadmap-arbete



  





 Arkitektur är en viktig del av rollen, men inte hela jobbet - fokus ligger på att få saker att fungera i praktiken, inte att producera presentationer eller teoretiska modeller.
 



  





**Din profil** 




 Vi söker dig som har en stark bakgrund inom cloud engineering och som vill ta ett bredare tekniskt ansvar. Du är trygg i att arbeta hands-on med molnplattformar, men har också förmågan att lyfta blicken, se helheten och bidra med teknisk riktning.
 



  





 Du har erfarenhet av att arbeta i större, komplexa och gärna reglerade miljöer, där krav på säkerhet, tillgänglighet och kvalitet är höga. Du trivs i gränslandet mellan teknik, plattform och verksamhet och tycker om att stötta andra genom kunskapsdelning och tekniskt ledarskap.
 



  





**För att lyckas i denna roll, bör du ha följande kvalifikationer:** 




  




* Minst 3 års erfarenhet av arbete med AWS och/eller Azure inom cloud engineering
* Praktisk erfarenhet av Infrastructure as Code och containerplattformar (Terraform, CDK, ARM, Docker, Kubernetes/AKS)
* Erfarenhet av monitoring, logging, backup-lösningar, CI/CD och cloud automation
* God förståelse för nätverk, säkerhet, identitet och grundläggande cloud-tjänster
* Erfarenhet av att bidra till eller delta i en cloud transformation journey
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta i större, komplexa och gärna reglerade miljöer
* Förmågan att lyfta blicken, se helheten och bidra med teknisk riktning
* Flytande svenska och engelska i tal och skrift
* Möjlighet att genomgå och bli godkänd i säkerhetsprövning enligt gällande regelverk



  





**Meriterande:** 




  




* Erfarenhet av att bygga eller vägleda cloud-plattformar, inklusive guardrails och tekniska standarder
* Erfarenhet från reglerade industrier, stora organisationer eller konsultroller
* Förmåga att översätta verksamhetsbehov till konkret teknisk lösning
* Cloud-certifieringar (AWS, Azure, GCP)
* Bakgrund inom produktutveckling, FoU, DevSecOps eller utvecklarfokuserade plattformar
* Erfarenhet från fordonsindustri, försvar, FoU eller tekniskt avancerad produktutveckling



  





**Vad du blir en del av** 




  





**Common Tech** 
 har i uppdrag att skapa gemensamma tekniska förutsättningar för hela Saab. Genom att utveckla och förvalta gemensamma plattformar, tekniska ramverk och arbetssätt möjliggör Common Tech ett effektivt, enhetligt och långsiktigt teknikutvecklingsarbete över hela organisationen. Målet är att ge Saabs team rätt tekniska grund för att kunna utveckla avancerade produkter med hög kvalitet, säkerhet och tillförlitlighet.
 



  





**Enablement Tech** 
 är en av flera avdelningar inom Common Tech och ansvarar för att bygga, vidareutveckla och förvalta de gemensamma tekniska plattformar som möjliggör Saabs utvecklingsarbete i praktiken. Här skapas förutsättningarna för att utveckling ska kunna ske snabbt, säkert och kontrollerat - i stor skala - genom stabila plattformar, verktyg och tekniska tjänster som används brett över organisationen.
 



  





 Fokus inom Enablement Tech ligger på att möjliggöra och accelerera. Genom välarkitekturerade lösningar inom bland annat cloud, utvecklingsmiljöer, plattformsautomation och gemensam infrastruktur görs det möjligt för produkt- och utvecklingsteam att fokusera på att bygga funktionalitet och affärsvärde, snarare än att hantera grundläggande tekniska förutsättningar. Arbetet handlar om att skapa återanvändbara, skalbara och långsiktigt hållbara plattformar som andra team kan lita på och bygga vidare på.
 



  





**Saab** 
 är ett ledande försvars- och säkerhetsföretag med ett tydligt uppdrag: att bidra till att skydda människor och samhällen. Med omkring 20 000 medarbetare världen över utvecklar Saab avancerad teknik i nära samarbete mellan människor, kompetenser och discipliner. Företaget präglas av en inkluderande kultur där samarbete, lärande och långsiktig utveckling står i centrum.
 



  





*Dessa positioner kräver godkänd säkerhetsprövning enligt den svenska säkerhetsskyddslagen.* 




  





**Ansökan** 




 Den här rekryteringsprocessen hanteras av Jefferson Wells för SAABS räkning, vilket innebär att du kommer att bli anställd direkt av SAAB.
 



  





 Vi tar ej emot ansökningar via email pga GDPR.
 



  





**Urval och intervjuer sker löpande. Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!**

title: IT Workplace Engineer to Brocc
description:
*Are you passionate about automation, modern workplace technologies and creating seamless user experiences? Brocc is searching for an IT Workplace Engineer who wants to shape their future workplace, drive automation, and support a growing fintech organization on an exciting journey.*
**About The Job**
 This service is a direct recruitment, which means that the recruitment process takes place through Bravura and you are employed directly by Brocc.
   

  

**About The Company**
 Brocc was founded in 2016 as a Stockholm based fintech specialized in peer-to-peer lending. They have since then transitioned into an established, pan-European niche bank within consumer lending and debt management. Brocc is active in 15+ markets across Europe, and have offices in Sweden, Finland and UK.
   

  

 Brocc is in a strong growth phase, with both the scale and complexity of its operations increasing in line with new business areas, products, and international expansion. This creates an environment where the pace is high, decisions are business-critical, and the right expertise will play a central role in further developing the company’s financial structure, governance, and decision-making processes.
   

  

 They aim to build a stronger European ecosystem through transparent, data-driven, and fair financial solutions. Read more: www.brocc.se
   

  

**Tasks And Responsibilities**
 As an IT Workplace Engineer at Brocc, you will play a key role in shaping and building the company’s future digital workplace. You will work closely with internal teams such as Tech, Security and Platform, collaborating to develop a scalable and automated environment that supports Brocc’s growth in Sweden and the UK. While you will begin with more hands-on responsibilities to understand the internal setup, the main focus of the role is to identify bottlenecks and automate and streamline all workplace processes — from device management to onboarding flows and identity lifecycle.
   

  

 With the 1st line IT support outsourced to an external partner, the majority of your role involves designing and improving internal workflows. You will be responsible for developing automated onboarding and offboarding processes and work with Intune and Microsoft 365 to modernize device management, establish configuration standards, and create self-service tools that reduce manual support needs. You will also handle the in-between tasks that requires access to Broccs environment, such as troubleshooting of on-site issues and the technical setup of the office.
   

  

 As the internal workplace environment evolves, your main responsibilities include:
   

  

* Developing, improving and automating onboarding, offboarding and internal workflow processes
* Managing Microsoft 365, Intune and device lifecycle across macOS and Windows environments
* Handling on-site troubleshooting, meeting room support and internal IT requests when needed
* Collaborating with external IT provider and ensuring smooth delivery of internal services
* Identifying opportunities to implement automation and AI-based improvements across the workplace environment


**Education, Experience And Personal Characteristics**
* Minimum 4 years of experience as an IT Workplace Engineer or similar position
* Strong knowledge of Microsoft 365, Azure AD / Entra, Intune and endpoint management
* Good understanding of both macOS and Windows
* Experience with scripting (PowerShell, Bash, or Python)
* Strong communication skills and ability to collaborate across teams
* Fluency in English (written and spoken)


**It Is Desirable If You Also Have**
* Experience from scale-ups, fintech or fast-growing tech environments
* Experience automating manual IT processes
* Experience working with external IT service providers
* Swedish language skills


 We believe you are curious, solution-oriented and eager to learn. You enjoy understanding how things work and finding smarter, more automated ways to do them. You appreciate both hands-on support work and long-term technical improvements. You communicate clearly, collaborate well with colleagues, and contribute positively to the team culture. Most importantly, you are motivated by building something modern, scalable and efficient.
   

  

**Other Information**
* Start: Upon agreement, as soon as possible
* Location: Stockholm (new office-location in Central Stockholm). Office-first policy with preferred 4 days/week at the office
* Salary: Upon agreement


 We use a competency-based method in all recruitment processes to ensure unbiased selection. If you are considered for the position, we will contact you for an initial interview. Regardless of whether you proceed in the process or not, you will receive feedback on your application.
   

  

 If you have questions about the role or about your application, you are welcome to contact our support at:
   

  

 📧 info@bravura.se
   

  

 📞 (+46) 010-171 47 10
   

  

 We recommend that you submit your application immediately as we make a continuous selection.
   

  

 Welcome with your application!
   

  

 #Brillante

title: Lösningsarkitekt
description:
**Att jobba som lösningsarkitekt nätverk**
 I rollen som lösningsarkitekt nätverk kliver du in som en central del av vår arkitekturförmåga, med det operativa och strategiska ansvaret för att forma samt styra utvecklingen av vår datakommunikationsplattform inom Skandias IT- infrastruktur. Ditt uppdrag är att ta helhetsansvar för lösningarna inom nätverk och säkerställa att de är i linje med vår IT-strategi och målarkitektur. Du leder analyser i tidiga faser, definierar riktning, hanterar beroenden och bryter ner behov i epics och features.
   

  

 Rollen innebär att du även arbetar med design, utveckling och styrning av nätverkslösningar som stödjer både verksamhetens behov och framtida teknikutveckling.
   

  

 I rollen ingår ansvar för flera teknikområden:
   

  

* Nätverk (LAN, WAN, WLAN, SD-WAN)
* Säkerhet (brandväggar, segmentering, Zero Trust)
* Moln & fjärråtkomst (Azure, MSP, VPN)
* Trafikstyrning (lastbalansering, proxy)
* Adresshantering (DNS, DHCP, IPAM)
* Automation (SDN och relaterade teknologier)


 Teamet du kommer tillhöra består av ett tiotal specialister som arbetar med Skandias applikations- och infrastrukturstöd. Gruppen ansvarar för utveckling, förvaltning och 3:e nivåsupport av infrastrukturnära plattformar. Vi sitter tillsammans i våra lokaler i Stockholm. Vår arbetskultur kännetecknas av kunskapsutbyte och ett teknikintresse där teamsamarbete står i fokus.
   

  

 Vi arbetar hybrid vilket innebär arbete på kontoret varvat med distansarbete. I rollen kommer du att rapportera till IT-gruppchef applikation- och infrastruktur.
   

  

**För att lyckas i rollen**
 Vi söker dig som har några års erfarenhet av att arbeta som lösningsarkitekt, gärna inom nätverk eller infrastruktur. Du har en solid teknisk grund att stå på och trivs i gränslandet mellan teknik och verksamhet. Du har djup förståelse för nätverksarkitektur och säkerhetslösningar där du driver lösningar från idé till implementering. Ett grundkrav i rollen är att du behärskar svenska flytande både i tal och skrift.
   

  

 Som person är du strukturerad, prestigelös och trygg i din kommunikation. Du har lätt för att samarbeta med andra specialister och ta diskussioner kopplat till det strategiska arbetet.
   

  

**Vad händer nu?**
 Vi jobbar med löpande urval så tveka inte att skicka in din ansökan redan idag. I ansökan kommer vi att ställa ett antal urvalsfrågor som ligger till grund för första urvalet. För att göra rekryteringsprocessen så rättvis och objektiv som möjligt kommer det att ingå intervjuer, tester, bakgrundskontroll samt digital referenstagning.
   

  

 Om du har frågor kring rollen, vänligen kontakta rekryterande chef Alexander Larre på alexander.larre@skandia.se.
   

  

 Om du har frågor kopplat till rekryteringsprocess, vänligen ta kontakt med Talent Acquisition Partner Harald Brehmer på harald.brehmer@skandia.se.
   

  

 Vi kommer att återkoppla till alla som söker oavsett om du går vidare eller inte.
   

  

 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!
   

  

**Mer om IT**
 Vi på Skandia IT är stolta över att vara en kundorienterad enhet som levererar effektiva och säkra lösningar för våra kunder. Med cirka 600 engagerade medarbetare är vi mitt i en spännande transformationsresa, där vi utvecklas tillsammans och har kul på vägen. Framåt tillsammans är vårt motto!
   

  

 Vi arbetar agilt och har sedan 2017 använt oss av SAFe (Scaled Agile Framework) ramverket, där leverans och kundvärde alltid står i centrum. Våra tågledningar och team, jobbar verksamhetsbaserat med aktiviteter som sprintplanering, daily stand-ups, team-synk, code reviews och retrospektiv.
   

  

 Var 12:e vecka samlas vi alla i vår ljusa och inspirerande Ljusgård på kontoret i Stockholm för 2 planeringsdagar. Planeringsperioden består av 6 tvåveckorssprintar, där den sista sprinten är en innovationssprint. Här får du chansen att, själv eller tillsammans med ditt team, utveckla och förfina våra system.

title: Python Developer - AWS
description:
Senior Python Developer with AWS,
 





  
 





 We are looking for senior Python Developer with AWS.
 





  
 





 Job Responsibilities
 





 \* Develop, and maintain backend services using AWS Serverless architecture.
 





 \* Implement solutions using Python, following best practices for performance, scalability, and reliability.
 





 \* Work with various AWS storage and database services to build robust data-driven applications.
 





 \* Troubleshoot, optimize, and enhance backend systems to ensure high availability and performance.
 





 \* Contribute to CI/CD automation and improve deployment workflows.
 





  
 





 Technical Skills & Qualifications
 





  
 





 \* Strong experience with AWS Serverless services (Lambda, Step Functions, API Gateway).
 





 \* Proficient in Python for backend development.
 





 \* Hands-on experience with AWS databases and storage (PostgreSQL or SQL).
 





 \* Good understanding of even drive architecture.
 





 \* Hands-on experience with AWS services (SQS, Event Bridge pipes, SNS)
 





 \* Good knowledge of IAC tools like (Terraform or Amazon CDK)
 





 \* Good understanding of Git for version control.
 





 \* Experience with CI/CD pipelines, preferably GitLab CI/CD.
 





  
 





 Additional Attributes
 





  
 





 \* Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
 





 \* Good communication and collaboration abilities.
 





 \* Passion for building scalable, secure, and high-quality backend systems.
 





 \* Ability to work independently as well as in team settings.
 



* \* Experience in event driven architecture and DDD (domain driven design)

title: Nordic Marketing Intern
description:
Arlo Europe, part of Verisure, is seeking a passionate and high-energy
 **Nordic Marketing Intern** 
 to
 **support marketing activities** 
 across the Nordic region. In this role, you will act as a key coordination point between Arlo, our retail partners, and internal teams.
   

  

 You will be based at our
 **office in Solna** 
 . We offer a
 **hybrid working model** 
 , with three days in the office and two days working from home.
   

  

 Arlo Europe is a technology-driven smart home security company combining hardware, AI, and cloud services to create innovative solutions used by millions of customers across Europe.
   

  

**Your Key Responsibilities**
 You will
 **support the Nordic Marketing Manager** 
 in executing marketing activities, ensuring high-quality content, flawless campaign rollouts, and impactful local market activations.
   

  

 You will help
 **run digital marketing campaigns** 
 ,
 **support in-store activations** 
 , and
 **assist in organizing local events** 
 . You will
 **collaborate closely** 
 with the sales team, the central marketing organization, agencies, and external partners to drive demand, brand visibility, and commercial success
   

  

**Market & Growth Support**
* Support the Marketing Manager on demand generation initiatives, 360° marketing campaigns, strategic partner campaigns, and new product introductions (NPI)
* Manage product pages with retailers, ensuring a seamless customer experience and relevant messaging across the customer journey
* Track campaign performance and ROI, providing insights and optimization recommendations


**Campaign & Channel Execution**
* Coordinate digital marketing activities across retailer websites (web banners, newsletters, sponsored products) from briefing to execution
* Assist with in-store activations, including packaging and shelf design, ensuring flawless execution
* Coordinate and assist with ratings and reviews collection and syndication across key retail partners


**Localization & Content Adaptation**
* Coordinate or provide local translations of marketing materials for Nordic markets
* Ensure brand consistency while tailoring content to local market requirements


**Reporting & Administration**
* Conduct competitor analyses and prepare actionable insights


**What We Offer**
* A hands-on internship where you will work on real marketing campaigns across the Nordic region
* The opportunity to gain experience in digital marketing, retail marketing, and product launches
* A dynamic and entrepreneurial environment, combining the agility of a startup with the strength of the Verisure group
* Close collaboration with experienced marketing professionals in an international team
* A hybrid working model with flexibility between office and home
* A brand-new office in Solna starting summer 2026


**Who You Are**
 You are studying Marketing, Digital Marketing, Communication, or a related fields at a university or vocational college (YH).
   

  

**Competencies And Skills We’re Looking For**
* Digital marketing fundamentals: you understand campaign planning, performance tracking and social media.
* Project coordination: you are able to manage multiple tasks, meet deadlines, and follow processes from briefing to execution.
* Strong written and verbal communication in English and preferably Swedish, including basic copywriting and translation/localization abilities.
* Analytical mindset: you are comfortable with tracking campaign performance, interpreting data, and proposing optimizations.
* Team collaboration: you will work closely with marketing managers, sales teams, and external partners.
* Adaptability & initiative: you are capable of learning quickly, following guidance, and taking ownership of assigned tasks.
* Strong fit with our Company DNA


**It’s a Nice-to-have**
* Previous experience in marketing, social media or e-commerce.
* Familiarity with smart home industry and natural tech savvy
* Interest in the consumer electronics or tech sector.

title: Engineering Manager
description:
**About Us**
 Legora is on a mission: to redefine how legal work gets done. From the very start we have been very clear about the fact that we are not building a solution for lawyers, we are building it with them, because it is the only way to make sure it gets done the right way; working side-by-side every step of the way.
   

  

 Our AI-native workspace empowers legal professionals not just to work faster - but to ask better questions, unlock new insights. Every day, we push the boundaries of legal tech to make complex processes smarter, faster, and more human. From thousands of documents analysed in minutes to intelligent workflows designed in collaboration with leading practices, we’re turning possibility into reality.
   

  

 Today we are trusted by global firms like Cleary Gottlieb, Goodwin, Bird & Bird and Linklaters in over 40 countries, but we have no plans on stopping here. We ship fast, we iterate effectively, and we scale rapidly - not by accident, but by design.
   

  

 When you join Legora, you become part of a team that believes "good enough" isn’t good enough and that the way to win is together, by empowering lawyers to do their best work with technology that truly understands them. If you’re excited by building from first principles, working with exceptional people, and accelerating change in a high-stakes, high-impact domain—then this is the moment and the place.
   

  

**We’re not just shaping the future of legal tech — we’re defining it. Ready to join us in building the intelligent future of law?**
**The role**
 As an
 **Engineering Manager** 
 at Legora, you’ll lead by example—hands-on in the code while guiding a talented team of engineers. You’ll architect and deliver features that make legal professionals’ lives easier, drive technical excellence, and help shape a product used by forward-thinking law firms around the world. This is a role for someone who loves to build, mentor, and scale both people and systems.
   

  

**What You Will Be Doing**
* Design and implement end-to-end features across our fullstack platform
* Contribute directly to the codebase while supporting the growth of your team
* Lead architecture discussions and technical decision-making
* Ensure high standards in code quality, security, and performance
* Collaborate closely with Product and Design to ship value quickly and reliably
* Review code, give feedback, and mentor engineers at all levels
* Champion best practices in development, DevOps, and continuous improvement
* Work with Node.js, React, Azure, AWS and Kubernetes
* Work every day to ensure your team is healthy and efficient


**Who You Are**
- A seasoned fullstack or backend engineer with 1-3 years of leadership experience

- Comfortable being hands-on while also setting technical direction

- Skilled in building scalable products and owning complex systems end-to-end

- Strong communicator who leads with empathy and clarity

- Passionate about mentoring others and helping teams grow

- Confident working across backend, frontend, and infrastructure

- Curious, pragmatic, and always looking for smarter ways to build and deliver

- But most importantly, you are someone who:

* “Gets stuff done” and understands building a successful company isn’t always glamorous and takes hard work and long hours
* Proactively and independently solves the most burning problems
* Strives in a fast-paced environment where the answers aren’t always clear and processes are few
* Candidates will go through the same interview process as software engineering candidates (including a coding task and a technical interview), with additional interview steps at the end designed for the engineering manager role.
* This is a Stockholm-based, 5-day in-office role, we believe building together in person drives better outcomes.


**Legora is an Equal Opportunity Employer**
 At Legora, we believe great teams are built on diversity of thought and experience. We’re proud to be an equal opportunity employer and committed to creating an inclusive, high-performance culture where everyone can do their best work. We welcome people of all backgrounds and don’t discriminate based on race, color, religion, national origin, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, disability, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description:
**About the Role** 




 We’re looking for a Machine Learning Engineer to join our growing Stockholm team.
 



 In this consulting role, you’ll work hands-on with machine learning projects for a wide range of clients across industries. Some projects involve training custom models from scratch, others focus on integrating state-of-the-art models into real-world applications.
 



  





 This role is ideal for someone who thrives in both collaborative and independent settings.
 



 We value self-starters who take initiative, enjoy solving open-ended problems,
 



 and want to see their work make an impact in production environments.
 



  





 As part of a tight-knit and ambitious team, you’ll have real influence – not just over technical decisions, but over the direction of our Stockholm office and the types of projects we pursue.
 



  





**Responsibilities** 




 Your work would include:
 


* Analyze customer needs and translate them into technical ML system requirements
* Design machine learning system architectures tailored to each project
* Train, fine-tune, and evaluate ML models, including LLMs and other foundation models
* Productionize ML models, including API development and deployment
* Design and optimize data pipelines for training, inference and monitoring
* Collaborate closely with clients and internal teams to ensure project success
* Stay up to date with developments in the ML ecosystem and contribute to internal knowledge sharing



  





**Background and Skills** 




 We’re open to a wide range of backgrounds but here’s what we’re looking for in an ideal candidate:
 


* Experience developing in Python, including ML frameworks like PyTorch, Scikit-learn and transformers
* **Understanding of ML workflows, from experimentation to deployment**
* Comfortable working in cloud environments (e.g., GCP, AWS, Azure)
* **Practical experience in software engineering** 
 , including version control, testing, and CI/CD
* Experience with large language models (LLMs) and familiarity with building LLM-based applications
* Ability to communicate technical concepts clearly to both technical and non-technical stakeholders
* **MSc or equivalent experience in a quantitative field and a minimum of 2 years of professional experience in the field**
* **Professional proficiency in Swedish and English**
* **Permission to work in Sweden, we will not sponsor any work visas at this time**



  





**About Us** 




 We are a modern AI consultancy firm originally founded in Malmö, Sweden. Recently, we’ve expanded to Stockholm, where we’re building a small but ambitious team of machine learning and software engineers.
 



  





 At our Stockholm office, you’ll find a high degree of autonomy, flexibility, and influence. We want your voice not only in code reviews and architecture discussions, but in shaping what our company becomes – from the types of clients we work with to how we grow our local presence.
 



  





 Believe you are a good fit? Send your application to careers-sthlm@mindified.com and include your CV, no cover letter is required.
 



  





 PS If you have any questions, you can reach us at the same address. DS

title: Manager (Pre-Sales), Field Engineering - Nordics Emerging Enterprises
description:
*FEQ427R245*
 As a Field Engineering Manager for the Nordics territory, you will lead a diverse team of technical pre-sales Solutions Architects and Engineers across the region. You’ll play a key leadership role at the intersection of technology and business—guiding your team to design impactful solutions and drive growth through collaboration and innovation.
   

  

 You’ll empower your team to communicate complex ideas with clarity, support strategic enterprise customer engagements, and build lasting partnerships with clients and internal stakeholders.
   

  

**The Impact You Will Have**
* Lead, mentor, and support a high-performing, inclusive pre-sales team across the Nordics for the Emerging Enterprises territory.
* Foster an environment of belonging, continuous learning, and psychological safety that reflects Databricks’ values of customer focus, teamwork, and diversity.
* Work closely with Sales and other teams to identify opportunities and deliver data-driven, value-focused solutions.
* Establish best practices that improve team efficiency, collaboration, and business impact.
* Build trusted relationships with customers and partners, acting as a strategic advisor in their digital transformation journey.
* Partner with Marketing, Sales, Services, and other cross-functional teams to ensure a seamless customer experience.
* Represent Databricks on the regional leadership team, contributing to our local presence and inclusive culture.


**What We’re Looking For**
* You do not need to fulfil every single requirement to be a strong candidate. If you are excited about this role and have related experience, we encourage you to apply.\*
* Proven experience leading or managing technical teams in Big Data, Cloud, or SaaS environments—or equivalent experience gained through hands-on engineering or consulting work.
* A track record of coaching and developing diverse, high-performing teams.
* Strong collaboration skills and the ability to partner effectively with Sales, Marketing, and other cross-functional leaders.
* Knowledgeable in how Emerging Enterprises, Startups and Digital Native businesses operate will be advantageous for the position.
* Excellent communication and interpersonal skills; professional proficiency in English (knowledge of any Nordic language is a plus, but not a hard requirement).
* Technical background in Data Engineering, Databases, or Data Science (consulting or customer-facing experience preferred). Foundational proficiency and strong enthusiasm in data, AI, and cloud technologies, plus experience in connecting these to real business outcomes.


**Notes**
* This role is based in Stockholm, within a reasonable commuting distance, and follows a hybrid working model.
* If you need any adjustments or accommodations during the application or interview process, please let us know so we can support you.


**About Databricks**
 Databricks is the data and AI company. More than 10,000 organizations worldwide — including Comcast, Condé Nast, Grammarly, and over 50% of the Fortune 500 — rely on the Databricks Data Intelligence Platform to unify and democratize data, analytics and AI. Databricks is headquartered in San Francisco, with offices around the globe and was founded by the original creators of Lakehouse, Apache Spark™, Delta Lake and MLflow. To learn more, follow Databricks on Twitter, LinkedIn and Facebook.
   

  

**Benefits**
 At Databricks, we strive to provide comprehensive benefits and perks that meet the needs of all of our employees. For specific details on the benefits offered in your region, please visit https://www.mybenefitsnow.com/databricks.
   

  

**Our Commitment to Diversity and Inclusion**
 At Databricks, we are committed to fostering a diverse and inclusive culture where everyone can excel. We take great care to ensure that our hiring practices are inclusive and meet equal employment opportunity standards. Individuals looking for employment at Databricks are considered without regard to age, color, disability, ethnicity, family or marital status, gender identity or expression, language, national origin, physical and mental ability, political affiliation, race, religion, sexual orientation, socio-economic status, veteran status, and other protected characteristics.
   

  

**Compliance**
**If access to export-controlled technology or source code is required for performance of job duties, it is within Employer's discretion whether to apply for a U.S. government license for such positions, and Employer may decline to proceed with an applicant on this basis alone.**

title: IT-Strateg / Enterprise Arkitekt
description:
För vår Kunds räkning söker vi en senior och verksamhetsnära IT-Strateg/EA-arkitekt med bakgrund som IT‑chef eller liknande, som kan ta ett helhetsgrepp om IT‑landskapet i ett mindre bolag.
   

  

 Uppdraget syftar till att skapa struktur och långsiktighet i IT‑landskapet genom att bl.a. mappa verksamhetens behov, föreslå rätt verktyg och arbetssätt samt påbörja livscykelhantering av system och applikationer.
   

  

 Kunden söker en
 **driven och självgående person** 
 som kan ta ägarskap, driva arbetet framåt och samtidigt utmana organisationen i både prioriteringar och vägval.
   

  

*Texten kommer att uppdateras!*
**NÄR DU BLIR PARTNER**
 Som partnerkonsult hos Wise kliver du in i en gemenskap där samarbete är kärnan. Du får möjlighet att arbeta med några av marknadens mest intressanta uppdrag, i organisationer där både människor och teknik är i centrum. För oss är det avgörande att du känner dig trygg och värdesatt i vårt samarbete. Vi stöttar dig, coachar dig och finns med dig hela vägen genom uppdraget. Hos oss är du inte bara konsult – du blir en del av en större helhet.
   

  

**OM WISE IT**
 Wise IT är specialister på rekrytering, konsultlösningar och strategisk kompetensmatchning inom IT och tech. Teknik förändras snabbt , men med rätt person på rätt plats får du kontroll på framtiden. Vi matchar människor med skarp teknisk kompetens och förmågan att förstå helheten. Resultatet? IT som fungerar i praktiken, inte bara i teorin. Vi ser till att du inte bara följer utvecklingen utan driver den.
   

  

**DIN ANSÖKAN // TALENT SPEAKS LOUDER**
 För att söka rollen klicka på ”Ansök nu”, samt bifoga CV. Notera att vi ej kan ta emot ansökningar via mail. I konsultvärden går det ofta snabbt så tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdatum. Vänta därför inte med din ansökan.
   

  

 Har du frågor om rollen är du välkommen att kontakta ansvarig konsultchef (NAMN & MAIL).

title: Cybersäkerhetskonsult
description:
Vill du bygga säkerhet på riktigt? Vi söker Cybersecurity Engineers.
   

  

 På Nexer Cybersecurity bygger vi lösningar som gör verklig skillnad – för verksamheter som vill höja sitt cyberförsvar bortom policies och powerpoint. Vi växer och söker Cybersecurity Engineers med fokus på praktisk säkerhet, sårbarhetshantering, analys och automation.
   

  

 Vad innebär rollen?
   

  

 Som Cybersecurity Engineer hos oss arbetar du hands‑on med att:
   

  

 Identifiera, analysera och prioritera sårbarheter och hot i kunders miljöer
   

  

* Etablera och driva strukturerad vulnerability management
* Automatisera scanning, rapportering och prioritering (scripts, API:er, pipelines)
* Arbeta med hardening, configuration baselines, endpoint/cloud/server
* Bygga och förbättra detection/logging‑flöden
* Implementera tekniska kontroller (EDR, identity, network, cloud) oavsett plattform
* Ta fram tekniska åtgärdsplaner och följa upp remediation
* Stötta kunder i att bygga en modern exponeringsreducering över tid


 Du behöver inte vara Microsoft‑specialist. Har du bakgrund inom AI-säkerhet, cloud, DevOps, nätverk, EDR, scanning eller automation? Perfekt.
   

  

 Teknikstack du kan ha erfarenhet av (några exempel)
   

  

* Vulnerability scanners: Tenable, Qualys, Rapid7
* EDR/XDR: CrowdStrike, Defender, SentinelOne, Rapid7
* Cloud: Azure, AWS eller GCP
* Container security (Snyk, Wiz, Prisma)
* Logging/detection: SIEM, så som syslog, KQL, Splunk, Elastic, Sentinel
* Automation: PowerShell, Python, bash, GitHub Actions, CI/CD
* IAM, Zero Trust, hardening, CIS/NIST‑kontroller


 Vem tror vi att du är?
