* Du har några års erfarenhet av praktiskt säkerhetsarbete i drift-, cloud-, dev eller nätverksmiljöer
* Du gillar att lösa problem, inte bara peka på dem
* Du vill utvecklas i ett team som jobbar nära både teknik och kund
* Du vill bidra till att bygga upp ett starkt erbjudande inom vulnerability management
* Du är trygg i engelska och svenska, både skriftligt och muntligt


 Vad erbjuder vi?
   

  

* Ett team som faktiskt vill bygga och förbättra – inte bara administrera verktyg
* Starka kunder och projekt där du får göra verkligt ingenjörsarbete
* Möjlighet att bli specialist inom vulnerability management, detection engineering eller cloud security
* Kompetensutveckling, certifieringar och community‑drivet lärande
* En kultur som kombinerar professionalism och entreprenörsanda
* Nexer Group – globalt bolag med 2 500 kollegor men lokal familjär känsla


 Start?
   

  

 Så snart rätt person kan!

title: Senior Platform Engineer
description:
Bannerflow is a fast-growing global SaaS company building a Creative Intelligence Platform that enables enterprise brands to predict, create, and optimize advertising across channels.
   

  

 We’re on a company-wide AI transformation journey, where AI and agentic workflows are becoming a core part of how we build and innovate, with high expectations on adoption across all teams.
   

  

 Our teams are highly autonomous, collaborative, and we are now looking for another passionate engineer to join us!
   

  

**⭐ Ready for a new challenge? Here is what we offer:**
 At Bannerflow, we build flexible and autonomous teams based on trust. We believe that when people are given the freedom to take ownership and work closely together, great things happen. Our engineering culture is shaped by openness, respect, and a shared drive to keep improving.
   

  

 We are passionate about solving real problems and making a meaningful impact, and we are always open to exploring new ideas. With us, you will be part of a growing tech company where ideas are valued, feedback is encouraged, and personal development is supported. We bring the energy of a fast-moving company together with the stability of a proven product and a strong customer base.
   

  

 You will join a team where motivation is high, knowledge is shared openly, and having fun is part of everyday life, whether it’s through hackathons, board game nights, or spontaneous team activities.
   

  

**Our Ever Evolving Tech Stack Currently Consists Of**
* TypeScript / Angular
* C# / .NET
* MongoDB
* Azure & Kubernetes
* Cloudflare
* …and some more stuff


**🦋 Are you + Bannerflow = true?**
 We are looking for a Platform Engineer who will keep our platform and infrastructure secure, stable and future-proof as we scale to new markets. As a Platform Engineer, you will not only build cool solutions together with our Platform team and Chief Architect, you will also work side by side with other product teams; educating, guiding, collecting feedback and removing bottlenecks from our development teams.
   

  

**So, what are we looking for?**
 A senior Platform Engineer with experience planning, designing, and implementing DevOps processes, strategies, and tooling to remove hurdles and pains from product development life cycles. You’ll need a strong sense of ownership, personal drive, and the ability to write clean, efficient, and well-documented code. You are interested in keeping up with best practices and like to continually improve our product and processes. We believe you are an excellent communicator that thrives in a highly collaborative environment.
   

  

 In addition to these traits, we’re looking for expertise in,
   

  

* Deep knowledge of kubernetes
* Solid familiarity with Azure Services
* Networking
* Linux
* IAC DSLs like Terraform or Biceps
* CI/CD best practices and tools like Github Actions, ArgoCD, ASO and Helm
* Disaster recovery


 We believe that our employees are the key to our success and we are dedicated to building a positive and supportive work environment where our employees can thrive and grow. We are committed to building a diverse and inclusive team and welcome applications from candidates of all backgrounds, experiences, and abilities.
   

  

 If you are ready to take your career to the next level, we want to hear from you!

title: ISV Technical Alliance Manager
description:
The Software Alliances team at Canonical works with leading software companies to optimize and enable their products with Ubuntu and other Canonical software, for instance our AI offerings. We develop joint product roadmaps, drive delivery, and formulate go-to-market plans, content and processes, enabling differentiated offerings and robust product life-cycle support anchored to best-in-class Canonical products. Enterprises are able to receive the benefits of open source, securely maintained, and validated solutions from cloud to edge, whether purchased from Canonical, embedded in Alliance partners' products, or accessed through the cloud.
   

  

 The successful candidate is someone who has a background in technology, engineering or product management and is interested in continuing to grow their career in business development. If you are someone who can navigate complex new technical challenges, learn quickly, and architect solutions and strategies across global teams, this challenging role is for you. This role is ideal for early career professionals with up to 7 years of experience.
   

  

 Location: This role will be based remotely in the Americas or EMEA region.
   

  

 The role entails
   

  

* Collaborating with product, engineering, alliance and marketing teams at partners to align on open-source strategies.
* Capturing partner requirements, evaluating gaps, and identifying Canonical opportunities.
* Coordinating with marketing and product teams on messaging, content creation, and launch plans.
* Creating partner- and customer-facing materials like reference architectures, joint blueprints, webinars, presentations, videos, and white papers.
* Driving Ubuntu adoption within targeted alliance accounts, advocating its benefits to stakeholders and working with partners on enablement training for their development, delivery, support and commercial teams.
* Influencing alliance partners to build with Canonical technology.
* Up to 25% travel, including internationally, for internal conferences and to drive partnerships in person.


 What we are looking for in you
   

  

* Exceptional academic track record from both high school and university or a compelling narrative about your alternative chosen path.
* Bachelor's degree in science, technology and/or engineering.
* Experience in software development and system architecture.
* Customer-facing experience in software engineering, product management, business development, technology strategy or similar functions.
* Excellent communication skills across all levels of stakeholders - individual contributors to the C-suite; ability to grasp complex material and synthesize key points.
* Ability to think and work at both strategic and tactical levels.
* Disciplined and self motivated for a remote-first workplace environment.


**Nice-to-have Skills And Experience**
* Experience with open source software and open source business models.
* Team leadership, product management or program management experience.
* Understanding of marketing and go-to-market strategy.
* Sector-specific experience in finance, telecommunications, automotive, or public sectors.
* Working knowledge of independent hardware and software vendor go-to-market motions.
* Post-graduate degree in science, technology or engineering field.


**What we offer colleagues**
 We consider geographic location, experience, and performance in shaping compensation worldwide. We revisit compensation annually (and more often for graduates and associates) to ensure we recognise outstanding performance. In addition to base pay, we offer a performance-driven annual bonus or commission. We provide all team members with additional benefits, which reflect our values and ideals. We balance our programs to meet local needs and ensure fairness globally.
   

  

* Distributed work environment with twice-yearly team sprints in person.
* Personal learning and development budget of USD 2,000 per year.
* Annual compensation review.
* Recognition rewards.
* Annual holiday leave.
* Maternity and paternity leave.
* Employee Assistance Programme.
* Opportunity to travel to new locations to meet colleagues.
* Priority Pass, and travel upgrades for long haul company events.


**About Canonical**
 Canonical is a pioneering tech firm at the forefront of the global move to open source. As the company that publishes Ubuntu, one of the most important open source projects and the platform for AI, IoT and the cloud, we are changing the world of software. We recruit on a global basis and set a very high standard for people joining the company. We expect excellence - in order to succeed, we need to be the best at what we do. Most colleagues at Canonical have worked from home since its inception in 2004. Working here is a step into the future, and will challenge you to think differently, work smarter, learn new skills, and raise your game.
   

  

 Canonical is an equal opportunity employer
   

  

 We are proud to foster a workplace free from discrimination. Diversity of experience, perspectives, and background create a better work environment and better products. Whatever your identity, we will give your application fair consideration.

title: Fullstack GenAI Engineer
description:
**Fullstack GenAI Engineer role - Industry-leading SaaS!** 




  





 If you are an experienced software engineer with a wealth of experience in building powerful GenAI tools for real-world products, and want to do so from scratch, without the volatility of an early-stage startup, this one could be for you!
 



  





 I'm working with an industry-leading SaaS company, whose Cloud-based product is at the forefront of global team collaboration and content sharing through a powerful but lightweight UI and a focus on security and scalability!
 



  





**☁Modern SaaS on AWS - Lightweight yet powerful UI 🖌- Real‑time global collaboration 🌍** 




  





 Having established themselves as a leader in this space, with a global customer base, they are in a fantastic position but see endless opportunity to continually optimize and evolve their product offering. Despite their international presence and enterprise-grade product, they retain a small company feel where everyone has an impact. Approx 40 people in the company, with a cross functional engineering team.
 



  





**AI!** 




  





 Now, they are looking to make major investments into AI, both strategically and financially, building cutting-edge agentic workflows and conversational AI agents which will transform their product.
 



  





**As a senior engineer, you will;** 




  




* Build a brand new AI infrastructure from early stage, working across the full software development and AI lifecycle from experimentation and ideation to Cloud deployment at scale!
* 
* Build new agentic workflows leveraging the most cutting-edge technologies
* 
* Play a significant and driving role in accelerating their AI journey, working in close collaboration with senior leadership from both product and engineering to plan, strategize and define the technical roadmap!
* 
* Work as part of a cross-functional and super talented engineering department. You'd work across the stack and so we think you come from a background in fullstack/backend software development.



  





**Requirements:** 




  




* A senior software engineer with a wealth of experience in fullstack/backend development, with a strong focus on building GenAI tools for real-world products!
* Somewhat of a generalist and a big-picture thinker where you are able to define and drive the technical roadmap alongside the management.
* Experience with: LLMs, AgenticAI, RAG, AWS, IaaC, Microservices, Typescript/Javascript; NodeJS/Python/PHP
* Fluent English speaker
* Swedish citizenship or permanent residence, EU citizenship or full right to work without requiring visa sponsorship.



  





 This is a fantastic opportunity for someone to join a mature and established product company, working on exciting engineering challenges and taking a huge degree of ownership, autonomy and freedom in this companies AI journey!
 



  





 This is a permanent role based out of their stockholm HQ - Hybrid

title: Fullstack Product Engineer
description:
**TL;DR** 
 - We’re seeking exceptional Fullstack Product Engineers to help build the future of AI. You will work across our entire stack to build features that will empower the next generation of creators and builders.
   

  

**Why Lovable?**
 Lovable lets anyone build software with plain English. From solopreneurs to Fortune 100 teams, millions of people use Lovable to transform raw ideas into real products - fast. We are at the forefront of a foundational shift in software creation, which means you have an unprecedented opportunity to change the way the digital world works. Over 2 million people in 200+ countries already use Lovable to launch businesses, solve complex problems, and bring their dreams to life. And we’re just getting started.
   

  

 We’re a small, talent-dense team building a generation-defining company from Stockholm. We value high ownership, high velocity and low-ego collaboration. We seek people who care deeply, challenge us, and are driven to build something of lasting impact.
   

  

**What We’re Looking For**
* 5+ years of experience building and shipping full-stack products
* Fluent in modern frontend (React/TypeScript) and backend development
* Solid understanding of systems design, performance tradeoffs, and scalable architecture
* Strong product sense and ability to make well-reasoned technical decisions, knowing when to prioritize speed and when to invest in foundational work


**What You’ll Do**
**In one sentence** 
 : Do all it takes to build a generational product and scale the core experience of lovable products
   

  

* Implement and maintain features across the full stack: frontend, backend and infra
* Own systems end-to-end: architecture, implementation, deployment, and iteration
* Collaborate closely with ML, design, and product teams to translate capabilities into intuitive, mind-blowing user experiences
* Drive the full development lifecycle, from technical planning to production launch and post-release improvements
* Contribute to shaping our technical direction, eng culture, and product strategy


**Our tech stack**
 We're building with tools that both humans and AI love:
   

  

* Frontend: React
* Backend: Golang and Rust
* Cloud: Cloudflare, GCP, AWS, Many LLM providers
* DevOps & Tooling: Github Actions, Grafana, OTEL, infra-as-code (Terraform)


 And always on the lookout for what's next!
   

  

**How We Hire**
* Fill in a short form then jump on an intro call with a recruiter.
* Complete a quick live coding exercise.
* Show us how you approach problems during several technical interviews.
* Tell us about your most impressive project.


**About Your Application**
* Please submit your application in English - it’s our company language so you’ll be speaking lots of it if you join
* We treat all candidates equally - if you’re interested please apply through our careers portal

title: Software Team Lead
description:
**Pixelgen Technologies** 
 is pioneering the next generation of protein interactomics with our innovative Proxiome products. At Pixelgen Technologies, we are mapping the "inner workings of life" by bringing 3D spatial resolution to the cell surface proteome. As the Software Team Lead, you will lead a team of software engineers to build the infrastructure and software solutions that turn raw DNA-sequencing data into profound biological insights. You will take command of the organization's software vision, strategy and roadmap, ensuring that our solutions and AI strategy are highly scalable and remain relevant within the rapidly evolving landscape of spatial omics.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Team Leadership: Manage and mentor a small, elite team of engineers. You will be responsible for hiring, code quality, and fostering an environment of high ownership within our organization.
* Software Strategy: Take ownership of the software strategy, vision, and roadmap within our growing company.
* Architectural Vision: Oversee the evolution of our open-source and proprietary software stacks, ensuring they scale with our growing customer base.
* Cross-Functional Strategy: Partner with R&D and Computational Biology teams to translate scientific requirements into high-performance software.
* AI Leadership: Own the AI/ML initiative and strategy, partnering closely with the Computational Biology team to integrate machine learning solutions that automate data interpretation and enable the discovery of high-value biological insights.


**Requirements**
* 8+ years of professional software development experience, including 3+ years managing and mentoring software engineering teams.
* Proven track record leading small, high-impact software teams, fostering a culture of high ownership and technical excellence.
* Expertise in designing, architecting, and operating highly scalable, secure, and data-intensive cloud platforms.
* Strong command of modern engineering practices, including CI/CD and DevOps principles.
* Ability to balance strategic high-level roadmapping with deep-diving into code and architecture with the team.
* Excellent cross-functional communication skills, particularly in translating scientific requirements into robust software solutions.


**The ideal candidate will also tick one or more of the following boxes**
* Familiarity with NGS (Next-Generation Sequencing) data, spatial omics, or proteomics domain context.
* Experience in a startup or biotech environment.
* Proficiency in the core technical stack (e.g., Python backends and modern frontend development) sufficient to support and guide hands-on engineers.
* Previous experience working with AI/ML systems and/or applications.


**Why Pixelgen Technologies?**
 You will be joining a venture-backed, multi-disciplinary team in Stockholm at a pivotal stage of growth. Your work will directly impact how researchers worldwide understand disease mechanisms and develop new medicines.

title: Senior Data Platform Engineer
description:
**Solve complex problems. Decode the future.**
 At Electrolux Group, as a leading global appliance company, we strive every day to shape living for the better for our consumers, our people and our planet. We share ideas and collaborate so that together, we can develop solutions that deliver enjoyable and sustainable living.
   

  

 Come join us as you are. We believe diverse perspectives make us stronger and more innovative. In our global community of people from 100+ countries, we listen to each other, actively contribute, and grow together.
   

  

 Join us in our exciting quest to build the future home.
   

  

**All about the role:**
 As a Platform Data Engineer, you are an architect and builder of the foundations. You do not just move data; you build the resilient infrastructure, automated tooling, and scalable systems that allow the entire analytics ecosystem to function.
   

  

 Your mission is to eliminate human bottlenecks by stitching together complex components into a high-performance, controlled, and reliable data engine. You will match the capabilities and scale of the platform to our unique business requirements, ensuring that every byte of data is stored, orchestrated, and accessed with maximum efficiency and minimum manual intervention.
   

  

**What you'll do:**
* Infrastructure & Platform Engineering: Design, build, and maintain the physical and logical architecture of our data platform. You ensure the platform evolves with our needs, moving beyond a "set it and forget it" mentality to a dynamic, scalable system.
* Ingestion & Integration: Build the ingestion layer to take raw data from various internal and external sources and integrate it seamlessly into the analytical platform for processing.
* Automation & Developer Experience: Champion the "machine-first" approach by automating repetitive tasks and building software to handle data efficiently. You ensure that data foundations are built on code, not manual inputs or human-heavy workflows.
* Orchestration & Workflow Management: Turn computational chaos into a controlled ecosystem by designing complex orchestration chains that distribute, monitor, and recover processes automatically.
* System Reliability & Performance: Optimize SQL queries, schema designs, and distributed processing tasks to ensure the platform remains performant as scale increases.
* Security & Cost Control: Implement tightly designed access controls and resource management strategies to ensure compliance and prevent cloud bills from skyrocketing.


**Qualifications** 
**:**
* Technical Background: Proven track record as a builder in cloud-based data environments (preferably Azure) with a focus on System Design and Architecture.
* Software Engineering Mindset: Strong foundation in Python development and experience with distributed data processing (e.g., Spark).
* Expertise in Data Structures: Deep knowledge of Data Warehouses, Lakes, and Lakehouses, including query optimization and schema design.
* Automation: Experience with Infrastructure as Code (IaC) and automated testing to ensure platform resilience and maintainability.
* Problem Solving: The ability to take a complex chain of computations and turn it into a controlled, reliable ecosystem that recovers easily from failure.


**Valuable extras:**
* Experience in MLOps Engineering to support model development and deployment.
* Knowledge of Security & Governance frameworks (encryption, access control, and compliance).
* Familiarity with Observability & Monitoring tools (logging, metrics, and audit trails) to ensure platform health.


**Where you'll be:**
 This is a position based at our Global Headquarters in Stockholm (Sweden).
   

  

 We are proud of our culture of inclusivity and diversity. At our Global Headquarters we have 60+ nationalities working together for our common goals. You will be part of this dynamic international team where English is the natural language.
   

  

 We look forward to receiving your application!
   

  

 As part of Electrolux, we will continuously invest in you and your development. There are no barriers to where your career could take you.

title: PLATFORM ENGINEER TILL BANKGIROT
description:
*Vill du vara* 
*med och bygga upp en modern, open source-plattform som är avgörande för hela Sveriges betalflöden? Trivs du i gränslandet mellan infrastruktur, utveckling, säkerhet och cloud native-teknik? Bankgirot befinner sig i en av de största teknikförflyttningarna i modern tid — och nu söker vi två Platform Engineers som vill vara med och forma framtiden.*
*Bankgirot har en unik roll på Sveriges betalmarknad. Vi ansvarar för att viktiga samhällsflöden fungerar varje dag, samtidigt som vi moderniserar infrastrukturen med högsta krav på säkerhet och stabilitet. Nu etablerar vi en ny, växande platform engineering-funktion — och här får du en viktig roll. Välkommen med din ansökan!*
 Din roll
   

  

 I vårt nystartade plattformsteam, ’Cloud, Container, Platform & Tooling’, får du kliva in i en produktionssatt miljö som på kort tid gått från idé till verklighet. Under de senaste månaderna har vi byggt upp stora delar av infrastrukturen, och nu går vi in i nästa fas: att skapa en mogen, robust och open source-baserad plattform där vi själva äger och utvecklar komponenterna.
   

  

 Du blir en nyckelspelare i vår resa mot att etablera moderna arbetssätt, ett genomtänkt GitOps-flöde och en plattform som är enkel att konsumera för utvecklingsteamen. Du arbetar tvärfunktionellt med utveckling, drift och säkerhet och bidrar till att driva vår DevOps- och cloud native-resa framåt. Du arbetar nära användarna av plattformen, fångar in behov och bidrar till vår roadmap där vi arbetar långsiktigt men i högt tempo. Rollen innebär mycket ansvar och du får stort förtroende och möjlighet att påverka grunden för framtidens betalningssystem. Dina arbetsuppgifter innefattar:
   

  

* Design, drift och vidareutveckling av containerbaserade plattformar (on-prem och cloud)
* Automatisera plattforms- och driftprocesser samt implementera och stödja CI/CD- och GitOps-flöden med verktyg som GitLab, ArgoCD och Ansible.
* Samarbeta med utvecklingsteamen för onboarding, stöd, feedback och förbättring av plattformens användbarhet och tillgänglighet.
* Samarbeta med säkerhets- och driftorganisationen för att säkerställa att plattformen uppfyller krav på tillgänglighet, prestanda och säkerhet,
* Arbeta proaktivt med observability, robusthet, säkerhet och incidenthantering för att säkerställa stabilitet i en samhällskritisk miljö.


 Vi söker dig som har
   

  

 Vi söker dig som har en solid grund i Linux och som byggt vidare din kompetens inom någon del av den moderna cloud native-världen. Kanske har du fördjupat dig i Kubernetes, CI/CD, automation, observability eller säkerhetslager — oavsett din hemmaarena har du en naturlig nyfikenhet att utforska nya områden och utvecklas. Du har god kunskap om DevOps-principer och föredrar ett T-shaped arbetssätt där du kombinerar din spets med en vilja att växa i andra delar av stacken, tillsammans med dina kollegor.
   

  

 Du trivs med att röra dig mellan on-prem och cloud och hos oss får du arbeta i en teknikmiljö som spänner över bland annat vanilla Kubernetes, Cilium, Longhorn, Istio, Ansible, GitLab, ArgoCD, JFrog Artifactory, Kyverno, NeuVector, Grafana-stacken, Prometheus och OpenTelemetry. Du är trygg i att arbeta med containerteknik och Git-baserade flöden, och motiveras av att bidra till arkitektur, val av verktyg och automatiserade arbetssätt.
   

  

 För att trivas i rollen ser vi att du är pragmatisk, lösningsorienterad, hjälpsam och bekväm med att arbeta i en miljö där mycket fortfarande formas. Du tycker om att samarbeta, ta ansvar för teknikens riktning och vara med och skapa struktur i en snabbt växande plattform. Här får du både fortsätta fördjupa dig inom ditt expertområde och samtidigt utvecklas inom nya delar i en bred och modern teknikstack.
   

  

 Ett utvecklande arbete med bra förmåner
   

  

 Som vår nya kollega blir du en del av ett kompetent och positivt team där vi samarbetar och sätter högt värde på varandras kompetens och erfarenheter.
   

  

 Vi satsar mycket på hälsa och välmående och erbjuder generösa förmåner för dig som medarbetare.
   

  

 Övrig information
   

  

 Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning baserad i Liljeholmen i Stockholm. Du behöver ha goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska.
   

  

 Innan anställning beslutas genomförs en säkerhetsprövning enligt säkerhetsskyddslagen (2018:585).
   

  

 Intresserad?
   

  

 I denna rekrytering samarbetar Bankgirot med Nexer Recruit.
   

  

 Har du frågor eller funderingar? Kontakta gärna rekryteringskonsult Johanna Värmfors: johanna.varmfors@nexergroup.com eller +46 730 821 230
   

  

 alternativt Jenny Nilsson: jenny.nilsson@nexergroup.com eller
   

  

 +46 (0)70 301 82 79
   

  

 Läs om fler lediga tjänster från Bankgirot här.
   

  

 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!
   

  

 Om Bankgirot
   

  

 Bankgirot är ett svenskt clearinghus och teknikbolag med över 60 års erfarenhet av att leverera finansiell infrastruktur till banker. I samverkan med betalsektorn ser vi till att privatpersoner och företag enkelt kan göra överföringar och betalningar.
   

  

 Bankgirot säkerställer att det nuvarande betalsystemet fungerar felfritt, samtidigt som vi utvecklar framtidssäkrade lösningar. Vi säkrar och utvecklar Sveriges betalningar.
   

  

 Läs mer på www.bankgirot.se

title: ERP Consultant
description:
At
 **Arcwide** 
 , we are more than just a consultancy – we are a team driven by
 **commitment, teamwork, excellence, and passion** 
 . As the largest
 **IFS Partner globally** 
 , we deliver world-class IFS Cloud solutions that transform businesses, and we’re on a mission to continue setting the standard for excellence. We are currently searching for motivated and dedicated individuals who are ready to take that next step of their career.
   

  

**What You Can Expect From The Role**
* Deliver expert consultancy on IFS Cloud ERP implementations, with a focus on Supply Chain, Manufacturing or Finance modules.
* Work closely with clients to gather business requirements, map processes, and design effective ERP solutions tailored to their operational needs.
* Configure and customise IFS Cloud modules to meet functional specifications.
* Support clients through all phases of implementation: from discovery and design to testing, training, and go-live.
* Act as a trusted advisor to clients, providing insights and recommendations to optimise business performance through IFS solutions.
* Collaborate with cross-functional project teams, ensuring seamless integration between business processes and the ERP system.
* Contribute to internal knowledge sharing and continuously develop your expertise in IFS Cloud and industry best practices.
* Support post-implementation reviews and provide ongoing client support where required.


**What We Will Look For In Your CV**
* Proven experience in implementing or supporting IFS Cloud or similar ERP systems in a consultancy capacity.
* Deep knowledge and hands-on experience in ERP module areas Supply Chain, Manufacturing or Finance modules.
* Strong business process understanding and the ability to translate requirements into effective ERP configurations.
* Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to build trust and influence stakeholders at all levels.
* Fluent in English (written and spoken).
* Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities, with attention to detail.
* Willingness to travel to customer site as required by project demands.
* Ability to work independently and as part of a collaborative team in a dynamic, fast-paced environment.


**Why You Will Enjoy Working At Arcwide**
* Competitive Salary - where you are rewarded for both your individual and company performance.
* Benefits Packages - you will also have access to excellent benefit packages including holidays, private healthcare insurance, pension contributions, wellness programmes, mobile phone and laptop, and much more!
* Hybrid working – where each team has autonomy to determine their in-person and remote working schedule.
* Continuous learning – we understand that it is imperative to invest in our people’s development and we ensure that you are always progressing in your career or learning development.
* Equal & inclusive culture – we are committed to having a diverse and inclusive workforce where each individual feels they belong and can thrive in a work environment with a strong sense of community.


**About Arcwide**
 As the demand for IFS Cloud consulting continues to grow worldwide, Arcwide strategically positions itself as the largest preferred IFS partner by combining the world-class business consultancy of BearingPoint with the best-in-class cloud technology and innovation of IFS, to implement digital business transformation globally, delivering more value, faster. Arcwide is an IFS Platinum Channel & Services Partner that offers a full range of services and support to their customers worldwide. Arwcide has more than 500+ professionals in 23 offices in 16 countries, who collectively have hundreds of years of IFS experience in delivering business and technology transformations. To learn more about our company, click here.
   

  

**Equality And Inclusion**
 Arcwide is an equal opportunities employer. We are committed to having a diverse and inclusive workforce where everyone feels they belong. Fostering a work environment with a strong sense of community and where everyone can thrive is a core pillar of our business. We are focused on attracting and retaining the best people with the right skills and the desire to deliver excellent results, regardless of background. In return, we will provide a working environment in which everyone feels valued and can fulfil their potential, where their talents are fully utilised and company goals are met. We celebrate the strength that comes from our similarities and our differences through local initiatives which promote inclusion, outreach, and respect.

title: Fullstack Growth Engineer
description:
**Tl;dr:** 
 We’re looking for a full-stack engineer obsessed with Lovable’s growth engine — turning first touches into daily habits, and daily habits into a thriving ecosystem and real revenue. One sprint you’re shipping onboarding and activation flows; the next you’re crafting distribution rails and monetization features that help builders reach more users and keep them around. You think in React and APIs, but your first instinct is always: does this make users more successful, more often?
   

  

**Coding skills + excellent taste + growth instincts + product obsession = you.**
**Why Lovable?**
 Lovable lets anyone build software with plain English. From solopreneurs to Fortune 100 teams, millions of people use Lovable to transform raw ideas into real products - fast. We are at the forefront of a foundational shift in software creation, which means you have an unprecedented opportunity to change the way the digital world works. Over 2 million people in 200+ countries already use Lovable to launch businesses, solve complex problems, and bring their dreams to life. And we’re just getting started.
   

  

 We’re a small, talent-dense team building a generation-defining company from Stockholm. We value high ownership, high velocity and low-ego collaboration. We seek people who care deeply, challenge us, and are driven to build something of lasting impact.
   

  

**What We’re Looking For**
* 5+ years of experience building and growing user-facing products in high-performing teams, ideally including growth work, marketplaces/platforms, or communities.
* Strong product sense and UX taste for multi-sided systems with creators, learners, and customers - you can see problems from multiple sides and design for all of them.
* Comfortable using data, funnels, analytics, attribution, and A/B testing to shape what you build and how you iterate.
* Skilled at designing, measuring, and iterating experiments, and thorough in setting up growth systems “right” from the start.
* Experience collaborating across functions (design, marketing, partnerships, support, data) to launch and grow new product surfaces and ecosystems.
* Enjoys designing reusable growth, ecosystem, and monetization tools that other builders can plug into, with a pragmatic and detail-oriented mindset.
* Motivated by helping others succeed and by seeing impact through engagement, measurable results, and revenue - you care about the scoreboard as much as the code.


**What You’ll Do**
 In one sentence: You will build the growth, ecosystem, and monetization systems that make Lovable - and the apps built on it - sticky, discoverable, and revenue-generating.
   

  

* Ship and iterate onboarding, activation, and reactivation experiences that create fast, repeatable value and turn first-time users into long-term fans.
* Build distribution rails for user apps: SEO and performance, shareable moments, social previews, email and lifecycle journeys, and other growth hooks.
* Ship marketplace and ecosystem features for publishing, discovering, and reusing apps, templates, components, and services - plus profiles, reviews, and matching between builders and customers.
* Design and implement monetization and pricing flows: payments, subscriptions, access control, plans, paywalls, billing integration, and revenue-share models that work for creators, customers, and Lovable.
* Build the analytics and experimentation foundations - events, funnels, attribution, and A/B tests - so the team can understand what works and double down on it.
* Collaborate closely with design, marketing, partnerships, and support to launch and grow new surfaces across the product and ecosystem.
* Keep the experience relentlessly Lovable while making growth the engine, not the afterthought.


**Our tech stack**
 We're building with tools that both humans and AI love:
   

  

* Frontend: React
* Backend: Golang and Rust
* Cloud: Cloudflare, GCP, AWS, Many LLM providers
* DevOps & Tooling: Github Actions, Grafana, OTEL, infra-as-code (Terraform)


 And always on the lookout for what's next!
   

  

**How Applying Works**
* Fill in a short form then jump on an initial exploratory call.
* Join us for a round of technical interviews
* Team intro calls with the team


**About Your Application**
 Please submit your application in English - it’s our company language.
   

  

 We treat all candidates equally, so please apply through our careers portal.
   

  

 Apply by clicking the link below.

title: Technical Sales Executive Scandinavia
description:
Join Nordcloud and be part of the European cloud revolution. We supercharge our customers to innovate in hyperscaler cloud, enabling seamless migration, advanced security, and data-driven success. This role focuses on winning new clients in the Enterprise and Corporate business sectors and develop some of our current customers in parallel. As a trusted advisor, you will develop strong relationships with C-level executives and
   

  

 stakeholders, ensuring Nordcloud becomes their go-to partner for cloud services.
   

  

**Currently, we are looking for a** 
**Technical Sales Executive – Scandinavia (Norway, Sweden, Denmark)**
 As a Technical Sales Executive at Nordcloud, you will be a driving force in our sales organisation, identifying client needs, designing cloud solutions, and managing the entire sales process. By delivering innovative cloud solutions, you will help clients increase operational efficiency and reduce costs, and ensuring that technology drives measurable business outcomes.
   

  

 Your technical acumen and consultative approach will empower you to understand complex client challenges, architect impactful solutions, and communicate the business benefits of cloud adoption to C-level and technical stakeholders.
   

  

 You will own your results, demonstrate a winner’s attitude, and collaborate closely with colleagues across Nordcloud and IBM Consulting to achieve your goals.
   

  

**Your** 
**key responsibilities:**
* Lead Technical Sales Engagements: Identify client needs and design tailored cloud solutions that deliver measurable business outcomes. Drive new business within existing client base as well as within new logo acquisitions leveraging your technical expertise, solution mindset and ability to link desired business value to technical solutions.
* Collaborate for Success: Work as part of larger teams—often led by IBM Consulting—integrating Nordcloud’s cloud solutions and value proposition into comprehensive, high-impact deals. Build strong relationships with internal teams, partners (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud), and stakeholders to deliver best-in-class solutions.
* Create Business Value: Apply a solution-based sales approach to address complex customer challenges, always focusing on how technology can advance the client’s strategic objectives.
* Ownership for Results: Take full responsibility for meeting and exceeding sales targets in consultancy and service sales, with a focus on cloud infrastructure, modernization, managed services, and consulting portfolios.
* Drive and Winner’s Attitude: Approach every opportunity with energy, resilience, and a relentless drive to win. Celebrate successes and learn from setbacks, always striving for excellence.
* Solution Workshops & Discovery: Lead workshops and discovery sessions with client stakeholders to uncover pain points and co-create strategies that maximize the value of cloud adoption.
* Thought Leadership: Represent Nordcloud at industry events and in the media, showcasing your expertise and our leadership in cloud technology.


**What we are looking for:**
* Background: Coming from a technical background with several years of experience in roles such as IT-/Cloud Architect, Cloud Engineer, IT-/Cloud CTO, IT-/Cloud Solution Manager or similar. IT-/Cloud Solution Manager or similar.
* Experience: 7+ years in technical sales, solution sales, IT consulting, or cloud services, with a strong technical foundation and a proven track record of winning and growing new business.
* Solution Understanding: Knowledge of public cloud architectures (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud), migration strategies, and cloud-native solutions. Ability to map technology capabilities to client business needs.
* Consultative Approach: Experience working directly with C-level stakeholders and senior IT executives, translating technical concepts into business value. With solution selling methodology you will craft tailored value propositions for complex cloud projects.
* Ownership & Drive: Demonstrated ability to take ownership for results, operate with a winner’s attitude, and thrive in high-growth, fast-paced environments.
* Collaboration: Proven ability to collaborate across teams and organizations, including cloud partners, to deliver integrated solutions.
* Communication: Excellent communication, presentation, and organizational skills, with the ability to explain technical concepts to non-technical audiences.
* Education: Bachelor’s degree in Business, Engineering, Computer Science, or equivalent preferred.
* Languages: Fluent in English and at least one Scandinavian language.
* Bonus Points: Hands-on experience with cloud services offerings, tools, and processes. Certifications in AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud are highly valued.


**What we offer:**
* Flexible working hours and hybrid working model
* Laptop and equipment to enable your efficient work
* Local package such as extensive private health care and insurance, wellness benefits


 Please read our Recruitment Privacy Policy before applying.
 **All applicants must have the right to work in Sweden.**
**About Nordcloud**
 Nordcloud is a European leader in cloud implementation, application development, managed services and training. It’s a recognised cloud-native pioneer with a proven track record helping organisations leverage public cloud in a way that balances quick wins, immediate savings and sustainable value.
   

  

 Nordcloud is triple-certified across Amazon Web Services, Microsoft Azure and Google Cloud Platform – with 10 European hubs, over 1,300 employees and has delivered over 1,000 successful cloud projects for companies ranging from midsize to large corporates.
   

  

 Our clients benefit from multi-cloud expertise that guides best practices, preempts pitfalls, provides essential technical support and steers teams through cultural change. From strategy planning to application management, we take our customers through the whole cloud journey to drive real business outcomes from cloud technology.
   

  

 Learn more at www.nordcloud.com
   

  

*Nordcloud values diversity and is dedicated to providing equal opportunities for all candidates and employees.*

title: Technical Area Manager
description:
**Om rollen** 




 Som Technical Area Manager hos MagiCAD Group AB spelar du en nyckelroll i att ge våra kunder utbildning, teknisk support och vägledning i hur de bäst använder våra produkter. Du samarbetar nära våra team inom utveckling, försäljning och marknadsföring för att kontinuerligt förbättra våra tjänster och säkerställa kundnöjdhet. Du blir en viktig del av den pågående produktutvecklingen och ett tryggt stöd för våra användare i deras dagliga arbete.
 



  





**Dina arbetsuppgifter** 




**Teknisk support** 




 Du hanterar och löser supportärenden professionellt med hög kundnöjdhet. Du stöttar även våra förstalinjeteam och ger vägledning till kollegor.
 



  





**Utbildning** 




 I denna roll håller du utbildningar i MagiCAD, både online och på plats, samt tar fram utbildningsmaterial för både grund- och avancerad nivå. Du anpassar alltid utbildning och konsulttjänster efter kundens behov.
 



  





**Intern utveckling** 




 Du deltar i lokaliseringen av nya MagiCAD‑versioner och samarbetar med säljteamet genom att leverera interna och externa produktdemonstrationer. I nära samarbete med marknadsteamet bidrar du med innehåll och branschinsikter, samtidigt som du håller en kontinuerlig dialog med produktägare för att stödja MagiCADs vidare utveckling.
 



  





**Affärsutveckling** 




 Du deltar i alfa- och betatestning och bidrar till kvalitetssäkringen av MagiCADs produkter. Rollen inkluderar även deltagande i strategiska projekt och aktiviteter under året, upprätthållande av nära kundkontakt, registrering av feedback i CRM och Jira samt uppföljning av signaler från marknaden. Du arbetar nära utvecklingsteamet för att förbättra produktportföljen och stödjer kunder under onboardingprocessen.
 



  





**Kvalifikationer** 




 Vi söker dig som har:
 


* Universitetsexamen inom VVS, El, Sprinkler eller BIM
* Erfarenhet av BIM och projektering
* Fem års projekteringserfarenhet i Revit, gärna även i MagiCAD för Revit
* God erfarenhet av Autodesk Construction Cloud (ACC)
* Flytande svenska och engelska
* Förståelse för byggbranschen
* Förståelse för beslutsprocesser inom konsultföretag och hos beställare



  





**Meriterande** 



* Erfarenhet av att hålla utbildningar i CAD, Revit eller BIM
* Erfarenhet av affärsutveckling eller roller inom CAD/BIM‑organisationer
* Erfarenhet av ACC och dess koordineringsfunktioner, såsom:
* Clash Management
* Model Coordination
* Design Collaboration



  





**Personliga egenskaper** 




 För att lyckas i rollen är du självständig och lösningsorienterad, med ett strategiskt tankesätt och god förmåga att se helheten. Du tar initiativ, arbetar strukturerat och är bekväm med att både ge och ta emot feedback för att driva kontinuerlig förbättring. Du har också stark kommunikativ förmåga, både muntligt och skriftligt.
 



  





**Övrigt** 



* Placering: Stockholm
* Planerad start: augusti 2026
* Rekryteringsprocess: Alkohol- och drogtest är en del av processen



 På MagiCAD arbetar vi hårt, men vi trivs också med vårt arbete och värdesätter en kultur där vi lär av varandra. Om du är redo att ta dig an denna spännande roll som Technical Area Manager ser vi fram emot din ansökan.
 



  





**Ansök idag!**

title: Senior Consultant Software Engineer
description:
**About Us**
 Visa is a world leader in payments technology, facilitating transactions between consumers, merchants, financial institutions and government entities across more than 200 countries and territories, dedicated to uplifting everyone, everywhere by being the best way to pay and be paid.
   

  

 At Visa, you'll have the opportunity to create impact at scale — tackling meaningful challenges, growing your skills and seeing your contributions impact lives around the world.
   

  

 Join Visa and do work that matters – to you, to your community, and to the world. Progress starts with you.
   

  

**Job Description**
 Visa Open Banking (aka Tink) is an open banking platform creating the foundations for a new world of finance. By unlocking the value of financial data through secure connectivity and powerful data products, Visa Open Banking enables banks, fintechs, and businesses across Europe to build smarter financial services.
   

  

**The Opportunity**
 We are looking for a Sr. Staff Software Engineer to join the Visa Open Banking AI and Data Platform organization in Stockholm. This role sits at the intersection of data platforms, AI, and product engineering, focusing on building data-driven applications and AI enabled experiences that make data easier to access, understand, and act on.
   

  

 You will work on services and applications that expose data through APIs, web interfaces, and conversational or agent-based experiences, enabling both internal teams and future products to interact with data in more intuitive and powerful ways.
   

  

 This is a senior individual contributor role with significant influence on architecture, technical standards, and product direction.
   

  

**Essential Functions**
 Data-Driven Application Development:
   

  

* Design and build scalable backend services and applications that leverage Visa Open Bankings data platform to deliver insights, analytics, and data-powered functionality via APIs and user interfaces.


**UI And Experience Engineering**
* Build and evolve web-based user interfaces using React and modern frontend technologies, enabling intuitive interaction with data products and AI-powered features.


**AI-Enabled Product Features**
* Implement and operate conversational AI, LLM-backed services, and agent-based systems, including natural language access to data, AI-assisted workflows, and intelligent summaries.


**API And Backend Services**
* Develop backend services using Python (FastAPI or similar) and/or JVM-based frameworks, applying clean API design, security best practices, and performance optimization.


**Platform And Data Integration**
* Partner closely with Data Engineers and ML Engineers to integrate applications with data pipelines, curated datasets, and AI components, ensuring reliable interfaces and clear ownership boundaries.


**Engineering Excellence**
* Apply best practices in software design, testing, security, observability, and operational readiness. Own services end-to-end in production.


**Technical Leadership**
* Lead design discussions, review architecture decisions, mentor engineers, and raise the bar for engineering quality across the team.


**Innovation And Continuous Improvement**
* Explore emerging patterns in AI agents, conversational systems, and data product experiences, and apply them pragmatically to real business problems.


 We do not expect that any single candidate would fulfill all of these characteristics. Some team members bring deeper strengths in UI and application design, others in backend systems or AI integrations.
   

  

 Success in this role comes from strong fundamentals, ownership, and the ability to collaborate across disciplines.
   

  

 This is a hybrid position. Expectation of days in office will be confirmed by your hiring manager.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 Basic Qualifications:
   

  

* Relevant work experience with a bachelors degree in Computer Science or an Advanced Degree (Masters or PhD in Engineering or Computer Science).
* Strong software engineering fundamentals with a proven track record of building end to end, production grade applications that combine backend services, data access, and user interfaces.
* Expert level skills in Java or Python, strong experience with JavaScript or TypeScript.
* Hands on experience building modern web applications and UIs using React, HTML, CSS, and related frontend frameworks and patterns.
* Proven experience designing and building data driven backend services using Python (FastAPI or similar frameworks) or equivalent JVM based frameworks.
* Experience implementing AI powered features such as conversational AI, LLM backed services, intelligent assistants, or agent-based systems, integrated into real products.
* Familiarity with agent orchestration patterns, tool calling, and emerging agent or MCP-style protocols for building extensible AI-driven systems.
* Strong understanding of API design, backend for frontend (BFF) patterns, and secure data access for analytics and insight heavy applications.
* Experience integrating AI ML components into larger systems, including prompt orchestration, evaluation, safety controls, and runtime monitoring.
* Solid experience with distributed systems, concurrency, error handling, and performance optimization.
* Experience with cloud native development and deployment (e.g., AWS or GCP, Docker, Kubernetes, CI CD pipelines).
* Strong collaboration skills with data engineers, ML engineers, product managers, and designers to deliver cohesive, user-facing solutions.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience building internal platforms, developer tools, or data analytics products with rich UI and API layers.
* Familiarity with data platforms, warehouses, or lakehouse architectures (e.g., BigQuery, Snowflake, Trino or Presto).
* Experience with observability, monitoring, and reliability practices for data intensive and AI enabled services.
* Exposure to fintech, open banking, or other regulated data domains.
* Experience mentoring engineers and influencing technical direction beyond immediate project scope.


**The Skills You Bring**
* End-to-end builder: Comfortable owning UI, APIs, and backend services together.
* Strong systems thinker: Able to reason across data platforms, application layers, and AI components.
* Pragmatic innovator: Balances experimentation with production-grade reliability.
* Collaborative partner: Works effectively across product, data, ML, and design disciplines.
* Continuous learner: Stays current with evolving AI, frontend, and backend technologies.


**Visa is an EEO Employer**
 Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability or protected veteran status. Visa will also consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories in a manner consistent with EEOC guidelines and applicable local law.

title: Senior Offensive Security Engineer - Penetration Tester
description:
**What You Will Do**
 As a Senior Offensive Security Engineer at Klarna, you will be at the forefront of safeguarding our digital infrastructure and customer data. This position demands a blend of hacking skills, creativity, and a deep understanding of cyber threats. You will simulate sophisticated cyber attacks to identify vulnerabilities, ensuring Klarna's resilience against real-world threats.
   

  

* Conduct white-box and black-box penetration testing against internal and public-facing applications and assets.
* Manage, triage, and investigate Bug Bounty submissions and external pentest findings.
* Perform variant analysis on issues discovered through all channels.
* Research and perform security analyses on Klarna’s 3rd-party solutions.
* Develop tooling to support reconnaissance, automation, and metrics collection.
* Provide expert guidance to developers, product security teams, and SOC investigations.
* Spread awareness of offensive security practices via demos, workshops, and training.
* Assess the security of our tech stack and help mature Klarna’s security program.


**Who You Are**
* Strong experience with penetration testing and technical security assessments.
* Experience identifying security issues in code, particularly within Java and Node.js.
* Experience with cloud environments, especially AWS and modern microservice design.
* Comfortable communicating findings clearly with concrete remediation recommendations.
* Skilled in Python scripting and automation.
* Self-driven, proactive, and engaged in advancing Klarna’s security culture.
* Industry-recognized certifications (e.g., OSCP, OSWE, CREST, GIAC, AWS).
* Active participation in CTFs and cybersecurity communities.


**Awesome to have**
* Collaboration within a diverse and innovative global team.
* Opportunity to work in Milan with a multicultural environment.
* Challenging scope with exposure to cutting-edge technologies.


 Please include a CV in English.
   

  

 Curious to learn more about Klarna and what it’s like to work here? Explore our career site!

title: Verksamhetskonsult (Business consultant) - Tietoevry Create (m/f/d)
description:
Jobbeskrivning
   

  

**PPS-konsult på Tietoevry - Bidra till framgångsrika förändringar! (m/f/d)**
 Tietoevrys PPS-verksamhet växer och vi söker nu fler kollegor som vill vara med och bidra till vår egen och våra kunders utveckling. Vår mission är att hjälpa organisationer att nå sina uppsatta mål och genomföra hållbara förändringar inom projekt- och verksamhetsutveckling. Det gör vi genom vår modell PPS via PPS OnLine, workshoppar, mentorskap och utbildningar – alltid med ett mänskligt och agilt perspektiv.
   

  

 Läs gärna mer om våra erbjudanden här PPS kunderbjudande
   

  

**Om tjänsten**
 I rollen kommer du att jobba både externt i konsultuppdrag med kunder i olika branscher och internt med t.ex. erbjudande- och modellutveckling. Du kommer att få leda utbildningar och workshoppar, leda webbinarier och vara rådgivare till kunder. Du kommer att ingå i ett team som agerar aktivt för att vara en lärande organisation i vilken vi hjälper och lär av varandra.
   

  

**Egenskaper och förmågor**
 Du är en nyfiken person som alltid strävar efter personlig utveckling. Du är trygg, ödmjuk och prestigelös samt affärsmässig med god social förmåga och förmåga att bygga starka relationer. Du tycker om att dela med dig av din kunskap och lära ut till andra. Du har även förmågan att hantera flera parallella uppdrag samtidigt. Du behärskar både svenska och engelska flytande i tal och skrift och har förmågan att formulera dig på ett övertygande och tydligt sätt.
   

  

**Erfarenheter**
 Vi söker dig som har erfarenhet av att arbeta som konsult, leda projekt med agilt arbetssätt och har arbetat i organisationer där agila transformationer har genomförts. Du har gärna även erfarenhet av att etablera eller driva portföljstyrning samt arbetat med effektstyrning, nyttorealisering och förändringsledning. Har du erfarenhet av att lära ut eller skapa digitala lärandemöjligheter är det meriterande.
   

  

 Om du vill vara med och bidra till framgångsrika förändringar och arbeta i en dynamisk och inspirerande miljö, sök dig då till Tietoevry och PPS-teamet.
   

  

 Låter det intressant?
   

  

 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan! Bifoga ditt CV eller din LinkedIn-profil så kontaktar vi dig. Intervjuer kommer att hållas löpande, så vi uppmuntrar dig att ansöka redan idag! Om du har ytterligare frågor om rollen är du varmt välkommen att kontakta rekryterande chef Marie Hansen, marie.hansen@tietoevry.com
   

  

*Vi utför bakgrundskontroller av alla slutkandidater.*
*Tietoevry avböjer samtal från rekryteringsföretag.*
**Om Tietoevry**
 Tietoevry skapar meningsfull teknologi som bidrar till att göra världen bättre. Vi är ett ledande techbolag med lång historia och närvaro i Norden men har också global kapacitet. Baserat på våra kärnvärden öppenhet, trovärdighet och mångfald, jobbar vi tillsammans med våra kunder – och utvecklar en digital framtid där företag, samhällen och människor kan växa.
   

  

 Våra 24 000 experter globalt specialiserar sig på cloud, data och mjukvara för tusentals företag och organisationer inom privat och offentlig sektor i mer än 90 länder. Tietoevry omsätter årligen cirka 3 miljarder euro och företagets aktier är noterade på NASDAQ-börsen i Helsingfors och Stockholm samt på Oslo Børs.
   

  

 Ytterligare information
   

  

 At Tietoevry, we believe in the power of diversity, equity, and inclusion. We encourage applicants of all backgrounds, genders (m/f/d), and walks of life to join our team, as we believe that this fosters an inspiring workplace and fuels innovation. Our commitment to openness, trust, and diversity is at the heart of our mission to create digital futures that benefit businesses, societies, and humanity.
   

  

 Diversity, equity and inclusion (tietoevry.com)

title: ERP Solution Architect
description:
At
 **Arcwide** 
 , we are more than just a consultancy – we are a team driven by
 **commitment, teamwork, excellence, and passion** 
 . As the largest
 **IFS Partner globally** 
 , we deliver world-class IFS Cloud solutions that transform businesses, and we’re on a mission to continue setting the standard for excellence. We are currently searching for motivated and dedicated individuals who are ready to take that next step of their career.
   

  

**What You Can Expect From The Role**
* Take ownership of designing end-to-end IFS Cloud solutions, ensuring they align with business requirements, best practice, and future scalability.
* Work closely with clients to understand their business processes and translate them into effective system designs and solution roadmaps.
* Provide leadership and direction during implementations, acting as a trusted advisor and subject matter expert across functional and technical streams.
* Collaborate with project managers, consultants, and technical teams to ensure smooth delivery of IFS solutions, including integration and data migration strategies.
* Stay at the forefront of IFS Cloud advancements and industry trends, advising clients on optimisation and innovation opportunities.
* Lead workshops, facilitate solution design sessions, and present complex concepts in a clear, business-friendly manner.
* Support pre-sales activities by shaping proposals and contributing to solution demonstrations.
* Mentor and guide more junior consultants, fostering a culture of continuous improvement and knowledge sharing.


**What We Will Look For In Your CV**
* Proven experience in architecting and delivering IFS Cloud or similar ERP systems (worked in an ERP implementation as Solution Architect or Lead Consultant).
* Strong understanding of key ERP modules such as Finance, Manufacturing, Supply Chain, Projects, or Service Management, with the ability to design cross-functional solutions.
* Demonstrated capability in leading client-facing workshops, managing stakeholders, and shaping solution design at both strategic and operational levels.
* Technical appreciation of system integrations, data migration, and reporting tools within an IFS/ERP environment.
* Ability to translate business requirements into practical, scalable ERP solutions.
* Excellent communication, presentation, and stakeholder management skills, with a consultative and client-focused approach.
* Experience working within an ERP partner, consultancy, or complex enterprise environment is highly desirable.
* Willingness to travel as required to support project delivery and client engagement.


**Why You Will Enjoy Working At Arcwide**
* Competitive Salary - where you are rewarded for both your individual and company performance.
* Benefits Packages - you will also have access to excellent benefit packages including holidays, private healthcare insurance, pension contributions, wellness programmes, mobile phone and laptop, and much more!
* Hybrid working – where each team has autonomy to determine their in-person and remote working schedule.
* Continuous learning – we understand that it is imperative to invest in our people’s development and we ensure that you are always progressing in your career or learning development.
* Equal & inclusive culture – we are committed to having a diverse and inclusive workforce where each individual feels they belong and can thrive in a work environment with a strong sense of community.


**About Arcwide**
 As the demand for IFS Cloud consulting continues to grow worldwide, Arcwide strategically positions itself as the largest preferred IFS partner by combining the world-class business consultancy of BearingPoint with the best-in-class cloud technology and innovation of IFS, to implement digital business transformation globally, delivering more value, faster. Arcwide is an IFS Platinum Channel & Services Partner that offers a full range of services and support to their customers worldwide. Arwcide has more than 500+ professionals in 23 offices in 16 countries, who collectively have hundreds of years of IFS experience in delivering business and technology transformations. To learn more about our company, click here.
   

  

**Equality And Inclusion**
 Arcwide is an equal opportunities employer. We are committed to having a diverse and inclusive workforce where everyone feels they belong. Fostering a work environment with a strong sense of community and where everyone can thrive is a core pillar of our business. We are focused on attracting and retaining the best people with the right skills and the desire to deliver excellent results, regardless of background. In return, we will provide a working environment in which everyone feels valued and can fulfil their potential, where their talents are fully utilised and company goals are met. We celebrate the strength that comes from our similarities and our differences through local initiatives which promote inclusion, outreach, and respect.

title: Linux Kernel Engineer
description:
This is a general track for applications to any team at Canonical that works with the Linux kernel, across all seniority levels. Apply here if you are an exceptional software engineer who wants to work on both stable and cutting edge Linux kernels for Ubuntu and its wider ecosystem.
   

  

 Canonical has a large and rapidly growing kernel team that underpins Ubuntu and open source more widely across a very wide range of hardware and use cases. We partner with the biggest kernel contributors - the silicon companies - to ensure that their work reaches the widest possible audience as quickly as possible, with a 10 year enterprise security commitment.
   

  

 The Canonical Linux Kernel Organization has teams in every time zone. We have opportunities for technical leadership, engineering management, and engineering directorships. The team is responsible for all supported Ubuntu Linux kernels, on all platforms and architectures from small embedded devices to standard desktop/server systems to large scale cloud environments, mainframes and supercomputers.
   

  

 We care most about hardware and virtualization enablement, security, reliability and performance. There are a number of areas where we lead upstream, but for the most part we are interested in ensuring production readiness and performance for the latest patchsets, rather than subsystem maintenance or evolution.
   

  

 Kernel Team projects include but are not limited to:
   

  

* Ubuntu Linux kernel plan, execution, benchmarking and stress testing
* Optimised kernels for key silicon and cloud partners
* Confidential computing and next-generation security primitives
* Developer platforms such as Raspberry Pi and RISC-V
* Enabling Ubuntu on a wide range of embedded systems
* Kernel Livepatch, which delivers critical kernel fixes without rebooting
* FIPS compliance
* Real-Time and Low Latency kernel variants and patchsets
* Virtualisation or abstraction engines
* Container technology
* Security with AppArmor, SECCOMP, namespaces and more
* Networking - in particular performance and security
* Storage - we are particularly interested in Ceph and DRBD


 We hire candidates of all experience levels from recent university graduates through seasoned industry experts. We select those who are enthusiastic to work in multiple areas including security mitigation, feature development, patching and test. You must have outstanding academic results, a background in software engineering, be motivated to work in a distributed team and willing to travel globally twice a year for company engineering events.
   

  

**Location:** 
 Working from home, worldwide. We have kernel teams and openings in every time zone and with the notable exception of Taipei, Taiwan, have no offices and therefore no pressure to work from an office.
   

  

 What your day will look like
   

  

* Collaborate regularly and proactively with a globally distributed team
* Work closely with silicon, cloud, or hardware manufacturers
* Diagnose and resolve issues in the kernel
* Take personal responsibility for a flavour of the Ubuntu Linux kernel
* Improve tooling and automation for delivery and test of Ubuntu Linux kernels
* Submit, review, and apply kernel patches


 What we are looking for in you
   

  

* An exceptional academic track record from both high school and university
* Undergraduate degree in Computer Science or STEM, or a compelling narrative about your alternative path
* Drive and a track record of going above-and-beyond expectations
* Well-organised, self-starting and able to deliver to fixed schedules
* Professional manner interacting with colleagues, partners, and community
* Ability to communicate effectively in English, both written and oral
* Significant programming experience in C
* Solid background with git
* Broad knowledge of the Linux kernel and kernel subsystems
* Demonstrated experience with kernel patching and debugging
* Understanding of Linux kernel upstream processes and release cycle
* Strong grasp of device drivers, BSP's, and other low level system engineering
* Professional written and spoken English
* Experience with Linux (Debian or Ubuntu preferred)
* Excellent interpersonal skills, curiosity, flexibility, and accountability
* Passion, thoughtfulness, and self-motivation
* Excellent communication and presentation skills
* Result-oriented, with a personal drive to meet commitments
* Ability to travel twice a year, for company events up to two weeks each


**Additional Skills That You Might Also Bring**
* Python and Bash scripting
* Prior experience with Ubuntu/Debian/Snap packaging
* Performance engineering and security experience


 What we offer you
   

  

 We consider geographical location, experience, and performance in shaping compensation worldwide. We revisit compensation annually (and more often for graduates and associates) to ensure we recognise outstanding performance. In addition to base pay, we offer a performance-driven annual bonus. We provide all team members with additional benefits, which reflect our values and ideals. We balance our programs to meet local needs and ensure fairness globally.
   

  

* Distributed work environment with twice-yearly team sprints in person
* Personal learning and development budget of USD 2,000 per year
* Annual compensation review
* Recognition rewards
* Annual holiday leave
* Maternity and paternity leave
* Employee Assistance Programme
* Opportunity to travel to new locations to meet colleagues
* Priority Pass, and travel upgrades for long haul company events


**About Canonical**
 Canonical is a pioneering tech firm at the forefront of the global move to open source. As the company that publishes Ubuntu, one of the most important open source projects and the platform for AI, IoT and the cloud, we are changing the world on a daily basis. We recruit on a global basis and set a very high standard for people joining the company. We expect excellence - in order to succeed, we need to be the best at what we do. Canonical has been a remote-first company since its inception in 2004. Working here is a step into the future, and will challenge you to think differently, work smarter, learn new skills, and raise your game.
   

  

 Canonical is an equal opportunity employer
   

  

 We are proud to foster a workplace free from discrimination. Diversity of experience, perspectives, and background create a better work environment and better products. Whatever your identity, we will give your application fair consideration.

title: Channel Sales Manager - Northern Europe (Civil Construction)
description:
**Your Title:** 
 Channel Sales Manager - Northern Europe
   

  

**Job Location:** 
 Sweden - Danderyd or Remote in Sweden, Norway, Finland
   

  

**Division:** 
 Civil Construction Field Solutions CCFS
   

  

*Are you looking to be a part of an award-winning organization and one of the fastest growing technology companies that is transforming the construction landscape with innovative technology solutions?*
*Join our team! We will offer your versatile tasks in a diverse, inspiring and dynamic working environment with great colleagues. Apply as soon as possible! Please, submit your CV/application only in English.*
 In this position you will have a very specific focus on CEC Machine control solutions and Connected Site promotion with a primary focus on Northern Europe. You will be deeply involved in developing solid business relationships with Equipment Dealers.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
 You will provide sales and application support for distributors and potentially end users in the CEC product portfolio You will:
   

  

* Increase market share through the development of Connected Site solutions to existing accounts and new customers. You will also be able to develop customer interest on Trimble Continuum solutions to develop sales on the entire CEC solutions
* Sell through select and perhaps multiple channels of distribution and have large project involvement, and will develop strategic key end-user relationships to ensure the successful sale of all Trimble products and services. You will have a strong field presence across the Nordic region
* Be responsible for ongoing dealer development through the introduction, follow-up and ongoing involvement in Trimble’s channel development programs/workshops.


**Primary Responsibilities**
 You will report to the Nordic Regional Sales Manager. Together with the Regional Sales Manager, you will participate in the development and implementation of regionally assigned sales plans. You will be in interface with distributor management, operations, sales, service and support staff.
   

  

**You Will**
* Develop strong long term business development with regional equipment dealers and implementation of Trimble Technology Outlets
* Conduct on site distributor training and job site demonstrations together with the application engineers
* Be in interface with major regional accounts
* Conduct joint sales presentations with focus on Educational Presentations
* Drive the Annual Review Meetings with key accounts in each dealer territory
* Assist in the identification, procurement and subsequent training of distribution sales and application personnel
* Evaluate marketplace potential for all served markets and customer segments using Data Analytics services as available
* Assist in the development of and participation in, specific technical communications and training requirements such as Trimble Dimensions, Boot Camps, Construction News, and others
* Ensure new product release involvement by all dealers including local strategy, training and proper inventory
* Provide input on competitive products and activities primarily to the CCFS Business Area
* Assist in the identification and development of new distribution.


**What Skills, Experience And Knowledge You Should Bring**
* Proven experience of successful consultative sales
* Experience in Channel development and management
* Business, sales, market and domain knowledge in survey, civil engineering and / or construction
* Ideally experienced in Technology solutions for Construction
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills
* Ability and willingness to travel up to+/- 50%
* Proficient knowledge of civil construction applications
* Product knowledge is a bonus
* Strong collaboration and relationship building skills
* Ability to prioritize, organize and manage multiple projects at one time
* Fluency in English and one Scandinavian language. Additional Nordic language skills are a bonus.


**About Our CCFS Division**
 Trimble's Civil Construction Field Solutions division focuses on providing advanced technology solutions to enhance productivity, accuracy, and efficiency in civil construction projects. This division integrates hardware and software tools to support the entire construction lifecycle, from initial site assessment and planning through to design, construction, and ongoing maintenance.
   

  

 Key offerings include machine control systems, site positioning systems, and software for project management and collaboration. These tools enable precise grading, excavation, paving, and site management, which help contractors and engineers streamline workflows, reduce rework, and improve overall project outcomes. For more information on currently developed products, see https://heavyindustry.trimble.com
   

  

**About Trimble**
 Dedicated to the world’s tomorrow, Trimble is a technology company delivering solutions that enable our customers to work in new ways to measure, build, grow and move goods for a better quality of life. Core technologies in positioning, modeling, connectivity and data analytics connect the digital and physical worlds to improve productivity, quality, safety, transparency and sustainability. From purpose-built products and enterprise lifecycle solutions to industry cloud services, Trimble is transforming critical industries such as construction, geospatial, agriculture and transportation to power an interconnected world of work. For more information about Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB), visit: https://www.trimble.com/en
   

  

**Trimble’s Inclusiveness Commitment**
 We believe in celebrating our differences. That is why our diversity is our strength. To us, that means actively participating in opportunities to be inclusive. Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion have guided our current success while also moving our desire to improve. We actively seek to add members to our community who represent our customers and the places we live and work.
   

  

 We have programs in place to make sure our people are seen, heard, and welcomed and most importantly that they know they belong, no matter who they are or where they are coming from.
   

  

**Trimble’s Privacy Policy**
****How to Apply:****
 Please submit an online application for this position by clicking on the ‘Apply Now’ button located in this posting.
   

  

****Join a Values-Driven Team: Belong, Grow, Innovate.****
 At Trimble, our core values of Belong, Grow, and Innovate aren't just words—they're the foundation of our culture. We foster an environment where you are seen, heard, and valued (Belong); where you have an opportunity to build a career and drive our collective growth (Grow); and where your innovative ideas shape the future (Innovate). We believe in empowering local teams to create impactful strategies, ensuring our global vision resonates with every individual. Become part of a team where your contributions truly matter.
   

  

 Trimble’s Privacy Policy
   

  

 If you need assistance or would like to request an accommodation in connection with the application process, please contact AskPX@px.trimble.com.

title: Senior SAP Project Manager | Complex Delivery & Governance
description:
**Introduction**
 A career in IBM Consulting is built on long-term client relationships and close collaboration worldwide. You’ll work with leading companies across industries, helping them shape their hybrid cloud and AI journeys. With support from our strategic partners, robust IBM technology, and Red Hat, you’ll have the tools to drive meaningful change and accelerate client impact. At IBM Consulting, curiosity fuels success. You’ll be encouraged to challenge the norm, explore new ideas, and create innovative solutions that deliver real results. Our culture of growth and empathy focuses on your long-term career development while valuing your unique skills and experiences.
   

  

**Your Role And Responsibilities**
 As a Complex Project Manager: SAP HANA, you will be responsible for managing complex SAP HANA projects from initiation to delivery, leading cross-functional teams to achieve successful project execution. Your expertise in SAP HANA, project management, and leadership will enable you to navigate complex project landscapes and deliver high-quality results that meet client expectations. Your primary responsibilities will include:
